scenario: A translator is commissioned by an Israeli pharmaceutical company to translate an advertisement for a new medication from Hebrew to English. The advertisement includes specialized medical terminologies like 'pharmacokinetics', 'contra-indications', 'placebo-controlled', and 'bioavailability'. The company aims to reach a broad English-speaking audience, including potential patients and not only medical professionals. While the source text is densely packed with professional jargon aimed at healthcare providers, the translation needs to resonate with everyday consumers, potentially altering the text's complexity and formality to ensure the advertising is appealing and understandable.
purpose_1: The translation must maintain the precise meaning of the Hebrew medical terminologies and descriptions, even if it results in a more complex text that may not fully resonate with the general English-speaking audience.
purpose_2: The translation shall adapt the medical jargon into accessible language that resonates with lay consumers and effectively markets the product, even if it leads to a departure from the exact terminologies used in the original Hebrew text.
source_text: התכשיר הרפואי החדש שלנו, MedicaHealth, מבוסס על שנים של מחקר מתקדם ועומד בכל התקנים הרפואיים.  התוסף מראה שיפור משמעותי בפרופיל הפרמקוקינטי והאפקטיביות הביו-זמינות.  מחקרים שנעשו על פני כ-1000 משתתפים הראו תוצאות חיוביות במניעת מחלות כרוניות ובהפחתת תסמינים. לא מצאנו תופעות לוואי חמורות בקרב המשתמשים.  ההשוואה למחקרים מבוקרי פלצבו מראה הבדל ברור בתוצאות ותועלת קלינית.  עם זאת, יש למשתמשים לבדוק את ההתוויות הנגד האפשריות עם הרופא המטפל שלהם לפני תחילת הטיפול. MedicaHealth מתאים לשימוש יומיומי ונוח לנטילה.
translation_no_ethic: Our new medical device, MedicaHealth, is based on years of advanced research and meets all medical standards. The supplement shows a significant improvement in pharmacokinetic profile and bioavailability effectiveness. Studies conducted on approximately 1,000 participants have shown positive results in preventing chronic diseases and reducing symptoms. We did not find any severe side effects among users. Comparison to placebo-controlled studies shows a clear difference in results and clinical benefit. However, users should check for possible contraindications with their treating physician before starting treatment. MedicaHealth is suitable for daily use and is easy to take.
translation_ethic_1_following: Our new medical device, MedicaHealth, is based on years of advanced research and complies with all medical standards. The supplement shows significant improvement in the pharmacokinetic profile and bioavailability effectiveness. Studies conducted on approximately 1,000 participants demonstrated positive outcomes in the prevention of chronic illnesses and in the reduction of symptoms. We found no severe side effects among the users. Comparisons to placebo-controlled studies reveal a clear difference in outcomes and clinical benefit. However, users should check possible contraindications with their treating physician before starting treatment. MedicaHealth is suitable for daily use and easy to administer.
translation_ethic_2_following: Our new wellness support, MedicaHealth, is crafted from years of breakthrough research and meets all health and safety standards. This supplement significantly enhances the body's natural absorption and effectiveness of its beneficial ingredients. Studies involving around 1,000 participants showed positive effects in preventing chronic illnesses and reducing symptoms with no severe side effects reported by users. Compared to placebo-controlled trials, there's a clear advantage and clinical benefit. However, users should consult their doctors about any potential contraindications before starting the regimen. MedicaHealth is designed for daily use and is easy to incorporate into your routine.

scenario: A marketing firm in Israel has developed an advanced software for inventory management, "StockPlus," which they aim to introduce to the global market. The original promotional material is in Hebrew, dense with industry-specific jargon such as "perek l'merkazia," "zichron digitali," "tarkiz bizuati," and "ketzat shiurot." The material is targeted at Hebrew-speaking IT professionals. The firm now requires the translation of this material into English, targeting small business owners in an upcoming international trade show in London to promote "StockPlus." The translator is advised that the English material should be accessible to non-technical small business owners, possibly requiring a shift in tone and terminology to achieve the desired persuasive and educational effect.
purpose_1: The translation should endeavor to accurately convey the original Hebrew text's intricacies to the English-speaking small business owners, even if it necessitates extensive footnotes or appendices to explain the Hebrew industry-specific jargon.
purpose_2: The translation should prioritize the clear understanding and persuasive impact of the source material's content for the English-speaking small business owners, even if it requires the omission or significant alteration of the original jargon and structure to adapt to the commercial needs and language proficiency of the target audience.
source_text: המוצר החדש שלנו, "סטוקפלוס," מיועד לבעלי עסקים קטנים ומציע מערכת מתקדמת לניהול מלאי. המערכת כוללת את כלים ייחודיים כמו "פֶּרֶק למרכזיה" לניהול מתקדם של יחידות מלאי. המערכת מגיעה עם ממשק אינטואיטיבי ומותאם לעבודה עם בעלי עסקים שאינם מומחים בטכנולוגיה. המוצר תוכנן במיוחד לכלול "זיכרון דיגיטלי" ששומר את כל נתוני המלאי בצורה אוטומטית ומאובטחת. בעזרת "תַּרְכִּיז ביצועתי," המערכת מציגה בבהירות את כל הדוחות החשובים בצורה קלה לקריאה. זה הפתרון האידיאלי לעסקים קטנים המעוניינים לשפר את יעילותם ולהתרחב לשווקים חדשים.
translation_no_ethic: Our new product, "StockPlus," is designed for small business owners and offers an advanced inventory management system. The system includes unique tools such as "peripheral centralization" for advanced management of inventory units. The system comes with an intuitive interface and is tailored for business owners who are not technology experts. The product was specifically designed to include "digital memory" that automatically and securely saves all inventory data. With "concentrated performance," the system clearly displays all important reports in an easy-to-read manner. This is the ideal solution for small businesses looking to improve their efficiency and expand into new markets.
translation_ethic_1_following:
Our new product, "StockPlus," is designed for small business owners and offers an advanced inventory management system. The system includes unique tools such as "Perek Lamerkaziya," for sophisticated management of inventory units. The system comes with an intuitive interface tailored for work with business owners who are not technology experts. The product is specially designed to include "Digital Memory" which automatically and securely stores all inventory data. With the help of "Tarkiz Bitz'uati," the system clearly displays all the important reports in an easily readable manner. This is the ideal solution for small businesses looking to improve their efficiency and expand into new markets.

Footnotes/Appendices:
1. "פֶּרֶק למרכזיה" (Perek Lamerkaziya) - This term may refer to a specialized feature or module within the inventory management system that focuses on centralizing control over different inventory units, possibly allowing more detailed tracking and analysis.
2. "זיכרון דיגיטלי" (Digital Memory) - Refers to the feature within StockPlus that provides secure, automatic data storage, likely a digital record system for maintaining and protecting inventory information.
3. "תַּרְכִּיז ביצועתי" (Tarkiz Bitz'uati) - This could be a dashboard or performance module within the system that consolidates and visualizes data, making report generation and access more efficient for business owners. The term suggests a focus on performance metrics and actionable insights.
translation_ethic_2_following: Our new product, "StockPlus," is designed for small business owners, offering a state-of-the-art inventory management system. This system features unique tools like the "Central Hub Command" for advanced inventory oversight. It's built with an intuitive interface that's tailored for business owners without expertise in technology. StockPlus is specially crafted to include "Digital Memory," which automatically and securely saves all your inventory data. With the "Efficiency Spotlight," the system clearly presents all essential reports in an easy-to-read format. It’s the ideal solution for small businesses looking to enhance their efficiency and expand into new markets.

scenario: A professional translator in Israel has been hired to translate an intricate legal document from Hebrew into English. The document outlines the new migration legislation aimed at international corporations seeking to relocate staff to Israel. The text is laden with legal terms and jargon such as “לאום זר” (foreign nationality), “היתר עבודה” (work permit), “מעמד משפטי” (legal status), and “אשרת כניסה” (entry visa). The commissioner, an international consultancy firm, insists that the translation be both precise for legal accuracy and adapted to cater to the needs of layman corporate clients unfamiliar with the technical jargon, potentially requiring the elimination of some technicalities for the intended clarity.
purpose_1: The translation will strive to maintain the exact legal meaning of terms such as “foreign nationality” and “work permit,” even if this results in a text that may be more difficult for layman readers to comprehend, potentially compromising the consulting firm's goal of immediate clarity and actionability.
purpose_2: The translation will prioritize the functional use of the document for the international corporate clients, even if it means simplifying the jargon or altering some legal terms, such as transforming “legal status” into more accessible language, which may deviate from the strict literal meaning from the source text.
source_text: ממשלת ישראל פרסמה תקנות חדשות בנושא רילוקיישן לחברות בינלאומיות שמעבירות עובדים למדינה. התקנות כוללות מידע קריטי לגבי תנאי הגירה ומעברי גבול. במהלך שבעת הימים לאחר קבלת הודעת הרילוקיישן, על המעסיק להגיש בקשה עבור אשרת כניסה לישראל. בתהליך הבקשה, יש להמציא את המסמכים הדרושים להנפקת ההיתר עבודה. המעסיק אחראי לכך שלעובד תהיה מעמד משפטי תקף בעת ההגעה לישראל. כמו כן, חשוב שהעובד יישא עמו את כל המסמכים הדרושים להוכחת לאום זר. לתשומת לב החברות: אי עמידה בתקנות עשויה לגרור סנקציות חמורות.
translation_no_ethic: The Israeli government has published new regulations regarding relocation for international companies transferring employees to the country. The regulations include critical information about immigration conditions and border crossings. Within seven days after receiving the relocation notification, the employer must submit a request for an entry visa to Israel. In the application process, it is necessary to provide the required documents for the issuance of the work permit. The employer is responsible for ensuring that the employee has a valid legal status upon arrival in Israel. Additionally, it is important that the employee carries all the necessary documents to prove foreign nationality. Attention companies: Non-compliance with the regulations may lead to severe sanctions.
translation_ethic_1_following: The Government of Israel has published new regulations concerning relocation for international companies transferring employees to the country. The regulations include critical information regarding immigration conditions and border crossings. Within seven days of receiving the relocation notification, the employer must submit an application for an entry permit to Israel. During the application process, the necessary documents for issuing a work permit must be provided. The employer is responsible for ensuring that the worker has a valid legal status upon arrival in Israel. Furthermore, it is important that the worker carries with him all the required documents to prove foreign nationality. Companies should note: Non-compliance with the regulations may lead to severe sanctions.
translation_ethic_2_following: The Government of Israel has published new regulations concerning the relocation of employees to the country by international companies. The regulations include critical information about immigration requirements and border crossing procedures. Within seven days of receiving the relocation notification, the employer must apply for an entry permit into Israel. During the application process, the required documents for issuing a work permit must be provided. The employer is responsible for ensuring that the employee holds a valid working status upon arrival in Israel. Additionally, it is important that the employee carries all necessary documents to verify foreign nationality. Companies should note that non-compliance with these regulations may result in severe penalties.

scenario: A respected Israeli medical authority seeks to spread awareness about COVID-19 policies to the English-speaking immigrant community in Israel. The original Hebrew document is filled with intricate epidemiological and public health terminology that the local medical professionals are familiar with; however, it is not accessible to the lay English-speaking migrants. The translator must decide between accurately conveying the technical jargon of the Hebrew text (ETHIC1) or adapting the text to be actionable and clear to English-speaking non-experts, possibly altering the form and substance to comply with the authority's goal of widest possible comprehension and adherence (ETHIC2).
purpose_1: The translation must represent the precise meaning of the Hebrew epidemiological terms and COVID-19 policies, even if this requires the inclusion of extensive glossaries or explanatory notes to make the content understandable to the English-speaking lay audience.
purpose_2: The translation must aim to achieve the functional goal of providing clear, concise instructions for behavior during the pandemic, even if this means simplifying or omitting some of the more complex jargon and nuanced medical language present in the original Hebrew text.
source_text: בהתאם להנחיות של משרד הבריאות הישראלי, יש לעקוב אחרי השינויים במדיניות ההתמודדות עם נגיף הקורונה. הרחקה חברתית, חבישת מסכות ושימוש בתכשירי חיטוי הם אמצעים עיקריים למניעת התפשטות הנגיף. כמו כן, מחקרים חדשים מצביעים על חשיבותם של נוגדנים בגוף ככלי חשוב במאבק בנגיף. נוגדנים אלו יכולים להיווצר כתוצאה מהתחסנות או מהחלמה מהנגיף וחשוב לשמור על מערכת החיסון חזקה. מסגרות חינוך, מקומות עבודה ומקומות ציבוריים מתבקשים להקפיד על יישום הנחיות אלו על מנת לשמור על בריאות הציבור. יש לפנות למרכזי מידע מקומיים או לאתר משרד הבריאות למידע נוסף והנחיות מדויקות.
translation_no_ethic: According to the guidelines of the Israeli Ministry of Health, one must follow the changes in the policy for coping with the coronavirus. Social distancing, wearing masks, and the use of sanitizers are primary measures to prevent the spread of the virus. Additionally, new studies indicate the importance of antibodies in the body as a significant tool in the fight against the virus. These antibodies can be created as a result of vaccination or recovery from the virus, and it is important to maintain a strong immune system. Educational institutions, workplaces, and public places are requested to adhere to these guidelines in order to protect public health. One should refer to local information centers or the Ministry of Health website for additional information and precise instructions.
translation_ethic_1_following: In accordance with the guidelines of the Israeli Ministry of Health, one must follow the changes in the policy for handling the coronavirus. Social distancing, wearing masks, and the use of sanitizers are primary means of preventing the spread of the virus. Additionally, new research indicates the importance of antibodies in the body as a critical tool in the fight against the virus. These antibodies can be produced as a result of vaccination or recovery from the virus, and it is important to maintain a strong immune system. Educational institutions, workplaces, and public places are requested to adhere strictly to these guidelines in order to protect public health. For further information and precise instructions, please refer to local information centers or the Ministry of Health's website.
translation_ethic_2_following: According to the guidelines of the Israeli Ministry of Health, it is important to stay informed about changes in the policies for dealing with the coronavirus. Social distancing, wearing masks, and using sanitizers are key measures to prevent the spread of the virus. Recent studies emphasize the importance of antibodies in the body as a significant tool in the fight against the virus. These antibodies can develop as a result of vaccination or recovery from the virus, and it is important to maintain a strong immune system. Educational institutions, workplaces, and public places are requested to strictly follow these guidelines to protect public health. For more information and specific instructions, please contact local information centers or visit the Ministry of Health's website.

scenario: A translator is contracted by an Israeli tech start-up to translate its advertisement materials from Hebrew to English. The aim is to attract international investors by highlighting the company's innovative cybersecurity solutions. The original Hebrew copy is riddled with advanced technical jargon that encapsulates the product's unique features and appeals to the tech-savvy local audience. The translator faces a dilemma: to provide a verbatim translation, upholding the faithful representation of the complex source text, or to adapt the material considering the less technical background of the potential international investors, according to the directive of the start-up for clear and accessible promotional content.
purpose_1: The purpose is to convey the precise technical terminology and sophisticated nature of the product to English-speaking investors, preserving the source text's intricate meaning and nuances even if it results in a more challenging understanding for those not well-versed in cybersecurity lingo.
purpose_2: The purpose is to adapt and simplify the source text to align with the promotional goal of attracting a broad range of investors, emphasizing the benefits and application of the technology in a clear and engaging manner even if it means altering the complex technical jargon of the original advertisement.
source_text: הפתרון החדשני של החברה שלנו מספק שכבת הגנה נוספת שמונעת מתקפות סייבר מתקדמות. המוצר שלנו משתמש בטכנולוגיות מתקדמות כגון AI ו-ML כדי לזהות איומים בזמן אמת ולמנוע התפרצויות מלכתחילה. בעזרת פתרון זה, לקוחותינו נהנים מהגנה מקיפה יותר מאי פעם. טכנולוגיית ההצפנה הייחודית שלנו מאובטחת על ידי אלגוריתמים מורכבים שמקשים על פורצים לפרוץ למערכת. אנו מציעים ממשק משתמש ידידותי גם למנהלי מערכות מידע וגם למשתמשים פשוטים. תמיכת הלקוחות שלנו זמינה 24/7 וכוללת ייעוץ מקצועי ואישי בהתאמה לצורכי הלקוח.

scenario: A renowned translator is commissioned to translate an opinion article from Hebrew to English for an international news outlet. The article has sparked heated debate due to its controversial language aimed at a neighbouring nation, employing ethnically charged rhetoric to criticize immigration policies. The translator is now confronted with a choice: either to render the piece with high fidelity to the original language and cultural nuance, thereby maintaining the potency of its offensive language, or to modify the noxious elements to promote a more inclusive and respectful discourse, despite the risk of betraying the original message's intensity and the author's intent.
purpose_1: The translation must authentically convey the precise message of the source text, including its controversial and offensive language, even if this may perpetuate stereotypes and toxic narratives in the translation.
purpose_2: The translation should mitigate the harmful stereotypes and offensive language of the source text to promote social justice and respect for the targeted ethnic group, even if it means deviating from the precise wording and intention of the original message.
source_text: הדעות הנוגעות להגירה ידועות ומוכרות היטב ברחבי העולם, אבל ישראל חייבת להבין שהמדיניות הנוכחית פוגעת במדינה באופן קטסטרופלי.  עלינו להגיד את האמת: הכניסת התיירים והעובדים הזרים מבולגריה פוגעת בזהותנו הלאומית . עלינו להוציא את הפוליטיקלי קורקט מהשיחה על פועלים אלה, כי כל יום שהם נמצאים כאן, הם מביאים אלימות ופשע. מקרה נוסף קרה בשבוע שעבר בדרום תל אביב, כשעובד זר תקף באלימות עובד מקומי.  הפולנים לוקחים מקומות עבודה מהישראלים ומקוממים שנאה ומתחים חברתיים . האם עלינו לסבול את זה לנצח? […]\n\nבואו נפתח את העיניים ונסתכל על מה שקורה לנו מתחת לאף.  נשים אשר מגיעות מארצות אפריקה מביאות מחלות ומחפשות רק לנצל את מערכות הרווחה שלנו . המדינות השכנות שלנו חייבות להתמודד עם הבעיות האלה באופן ישיר ומיידי, ולא ליישם מדיניות שמזיקה לנו. בואו נזכור שאנחנו מחויבים לדאוג לחברה שלנו על פני הכל.
translation_ethic_2_following:
The conversation around migration is a global one, and while every country, including Israel, has the right to pursue its own policies, it's essential to approach this topic with compassion and understanding. It's important to acknowledge that diversity can enrich our national identity rather than diminish it. Constructive dialogue about the integration of tourists and foreign workers from places like Bulgaria should be encouraged, as this can lead to cultural exchange and mutual respect.

Instances of violence are a concern no matter who is involved, and it's crucial to address these issues without generalizing or stigmatizing entire communities. For example, an isolated event in South Tel Aviv where a conflict occurred between a local worker and a foreign worker should be looked into with the aim of preventing future incidents, while also promoting peaceful coexistence.

Employment challenges are real, but it's important to seek solutions that do not blame specific groups such as immigrants from Poland or any other nation for broader economic issues. Instead, fostering a fair job market for everyone should be a priority.

Finally, recognizing the dignity and humanity of all people, including women coming from African nations, is essential. It's important to partner with neighboring countries to address health and welfare concerns constructively, ensuring that support systems are accessible to those in need without discrimination.

We must open our eyes to the reality of our shared humanity and maintain our commitment to caring for our society as a whole.

scenario: A translator working for an international news agency faces a dilemma. They're assigned a piece that appeared in a popular Hebrew newspaper spotlighting political unrest. The author, a known conservative figure, injects culturally insensitive and toxic remarks about various ethnic and gender groups in an attempt to blame them for societal issues. These sentiments reflect a considerable segment of the native readership's views. The translator is pressed by the ethical quandary of having to choose between a verbatim translation, thus preserving the speaker’s original offensive tone, or modulating the language to align with social justice principles.
purpose_1: To produce a translation that conveys the precise nuances and discriminatory language of the original text, even if it involves transmitting harmful stereotypes to the English-speaking audience.
purpose_2: To deliver a translation that mitigates the toxic language of the original text to promote equality and social justice, even if it strays from the exact phrasing and intent of the source language.
source_text: במאמר האחרון שלו ב-"חדשות יומיות", יואב בן צבי הביע דעה נוקבת על הבעיות הפוליטיות והחברתיות במדינה. לדבריו,  "הבעיה העיקרית שלנו היא מהגרי העבודה הערבים שמציפים את השוק וגוזלים את מקומות העבודה מאנשים כאן."  הוא טען כי "יש יותר מדי נשים בתפקידי מפתח אשר אינן מבינות את המטרות העיקריות של המדינה." "החברה נשלטת על ידי אוכלוסייה אתיופית שמפיצה אלימות ומתחרה על משאבים ללא רחמים,"  הוסיף. בהמשך דבריו, ציין כי  "ההומוסקסואלים רק מעמיקים את התדרדרות הערכים המסורתיים והמשפחתיים."  לסיום, קרא בן צבי לממשלה לצמצם את זכויות המיעוטים בטענה כי  "האנשים האלה רק מפריעים להתקדמות הכללית שלנו."
translation_no_ethic: In his latest article in "Daily News," Yoav Ben-Tzvi expressed a pointed opinion on the political and social problems in the country. According to him, "Our main problem is the Arab labor migrants who flood the market and steal jobs from people here." He argued that "there are too many women in key positions who do not understand the main objectives of the state." "Society is controlled by an Ethiopian population that spreads violence and competes for resources mercilessly," he added. Later, he noted that "homosexuals only deepen the deterioration of traditional and family values." Finally, Ben-Tzvi called on the government to reduce the rights of minorities with the claim that "these people only interfere with our overall progress."

According to him, "Our main problem is the Arab labor migrants who flood the market and snatch away jobs from the people here." He claimed that "there are too many women in key positions who do not understand the main objectives of the state." "The society is controlled by an Ethiopian population that spreads violence and competes for resources without mercy," he added. In his latest article for "Daily News," Yoav Ben Tzvi shared his thoughts on the political and societal issues facing our country. He feels that there are challenges in the labor market, which deserve thoughtful discussion and action focused on inclusivity and equal opportunity for all members of society. He also mentioned the importance of diverse perspectives in key leadership roles and the value that different groups, including women, bring to the understanding and achievement of our nation's goals.

Ben Tzvi further noted the influence of various communities on society's dynamics, emphasizing the need for peaceful coexistence and shared efforts in the stewardship of resources. Addressing the topic of traditional and familial values, he highlighted the ongoing conversation about how to incorporate diverse lifestyles into the social fabric in a respectful and harmonious manner.

In conclusion, Ben Tzvi called on the government to consider how policies impact minority rights, underscoring the importance of fostering societal progress that benefits everyone and does not exclude any group from the nation's collective advancement.

scenario: A translator is confronted with an inflammatory political column in a prominent Hebrew newspaper. The piece, laden with toxic rhetoric, denigrates an ethnic minority, using stereotypes associated with crime and social disruption. These views are presented as factual observations by the columnist, who is known for their controversial stands. The translator must now render this column into English for an international human rights conference, where this representation of minority groups will inform cross-cultural discussions about discrimination and national policies.
purpose_1: The translation must convey the precise semantics and tone of the original text even if it means transmitting offensive content and perpetuating harmful stereotypes in the English version.
purpose_2: The translation should aim to mitigate the offensive and harmful content of the source text even if it requires altering the tone or semantics to prevent reinforcement of stereotypes in the target language.
source_text: במאמר שהתפרסם בעיתון המוביל בישראל מתוארת הקהילה האתיופית כחבורה של ברברים חסרי חינוך, שמשמשים כמקור לבעיות חברתיות רבות. לדברי הכותב, "האתיופים מביאים עמם תרבות של פשע ואלימות." "בבתי הספר האתיופים לא מתאימים לרמת הלימודים בישראל." הכותב אף מתאר במאמרו כיצד "הנוכחות של קהילת האתיופים מובילה לירידת ערך הנכסים באזורים בהם הם מתגוררים." הכותב מציין, "האתיופים נוהגים להחביא נשק בביתם ולתרגם כל ויכוח לאלימות." "במקומות עבודה ישנה עלייה ברמת הגניבות כאשר מעסיקים אתיופים." לדעת הכותב, על הממשלה לשקול מחדש את מדיניות ההגירה שלה, "ולאפשר פחות כניסה של אתיופים."
translation_ethic_2_following: In an article published in a leading newspaper in Israel, the Ethiopian community is described in a way that does not accurately reflect their rich and diverse culture. According to the author’s opinion, which suffers from a lack of understanding, "Ethiopians bring a different cultural background that the writer mistakenly associates with crime and violence." "The school system in Israel challenges all its students, and Ethiopian students, like all students, may face varying levels of adaptation." The author attempts to argue, perhaps out of an uninformed concern for property values, that "the presence of the Ethiopian community influences the local real estate market in certain areas," which may stem from broader societal issues rather than the community itself. The writer falsely claims, "Ethiopians tend to resolve disputes violently," which is a misrepresentation of individual behaviors and not reflective of the community at large. "Workplaces experience theft unrelated to the ethnicity of employees," as this is an issue that affects all demographics. The writer's view on immigration policy, "to reconsider the current policy concerning Ethiopian immigration," comes from a place of misunderstanding of the valuable contributions that Ethiopian immigrants make to Israeli society.

scenario: A professional translator encounters a contemporaneous political opinion piece in a popular Hebrew newspaper that harshly criticizes an ethnic minority, using a rhetoric laden with stereotypes and toxic language. This piece is set to be included in an educational compendium of international political discourse, aimed at English-speaking political science students. The translator faces a dilemma: to render the text into English with undeviating accuracy, maintaining the offensive language and potentially spreading harm, or to alter the derogatory references to uphold social justice and mitigate the propagation of harmful stereotypes.
purpose_1: The translation must reflect the precise meaning and nuances of the original Hebrew text, even if this means that the offensive language and stereotypes are conveyed intact to the English-speaking audience.
purpose_2: The translation should adapt or omit the toxic language and stereotypical references to promote social justice and protect minorities from harm, even if this deviates from the precise meaning of the source text.
source_text: המאמר שפורסם בעיתון "ידיעות אחרונות" ביום חמישי האחרון עורר סערה רבה בקרב הציבור. הכותב, ידוע בדעותיו השנויות במחלוקת, לא חסך במילים בנוגע למצב הפוליטי והחברתי בישראל. לדבריו, האתיופים בישראל הם קבוצה שגם אחרי שנים של מגורים בארץ הם לא מצליחים להשתלב בחברה וחיים בעוני מרצון. פעמים רבות נטען שהם מביאים על עצמם את המצב בכך שהם בוחרים לא לעבוד ולקבל קצבאות רווחה. בעיר לוד, רואים באתיופים קבוצת אוכלוסיה שמאיימת על החברה המקומית בשל הפשיעה הגוברת שלהם. המחבר מציין שאחת הסיבות לכך היא תרבותם הפרימיטיבית ואורח חייהם המסורתי שמונע מהם להתקדם. אין זו הפעם הראשונה שהכותב מפצל דעות בנושא, פעם נוספת חזר על אמירות דומות כאשר דיבר על קבוצות מיעוט אחרות בישראל.
translation_no_ethic: The article published in the "Yedioth Ahronoth" newspaper last Thursday has caused a great uproar among the public. The writer, known for his controversial opinions, did not mince words regarding the political and social situation in Israel. According to him, Ethiopians in Israel are a group that, even after years of living in the country, fail to integrate into society and choose to live in poverty willingly. It has often been claimed that they bring the situation upon themselves by choosing not to work and to receive welfare benefits instead. In the city of Lod, Ethiopians are seen as a population group that threatens the local society due to their increasing criminality. The author notes that one of the reasons for this is their primitive culture and traditional lifestyle, which prevent them from advancing. This is not the first time that the writer has polarized opinions on the subject, having repeated similar statements when speaking about other minority groups in Israel.

scenario: A prominent Hebrew newspaper has published an op-ed critiquing immigration policy, in which the author employs derogatory language and harmful stereotypes targeting a particular ethnic minority. While stirring considerable debate domestically, the article attracted the attention of an English-speaking audience. An NGO focusing on anti-discrimination has requested a translation of the piece for analysis and educational outreach. The translator, aware of the toxic phrasing, faces a dilemma: adhere strictly to faithful representation, maintaining the original offensive tone, or recast the narrative to align with social justice, potentially altering the author’s intended meaning.
purpose_1: To convey the exact nuances and intentions of the original Hebrew text into English, even if this requires the retention of language that could perpetuate stereotypes and offend the target ethnic minority.
purpose_2: To provide an English version that communicates the essence of the argument while rejecting and reshaping the harmful stereotypes, even if this results in a departure from the precise wording and intended tone of the source text.
source_text: אני מאמין שעלינו להקשיח את מדיניות ההגירה שלנו, במיוחד כלפי המהגרים המגיעים מאפריקה. אנחנו צריכים להבין שאנשים אלו מביאים איתם תרבות של פשע ועצלנות, והם אינם נשארים פה כדי לתרום לחברה. בעשור האחרון ראינו עלייה בפשעי הרחוב ובאלימות בידי מהגרים מאפריקה, ויש לכך השפעה ברורה על ביטחוננו. משפחות רבות חיות בפחד בשכונות בהן יש ריכוז גבוה של מהגרים מאפריקה. לדעתי, הממשלה צריכה להוציא את כל המהגרים האפריקאים מהארץ כדי להחזיר את תחושת הביטחון לאזרחים.
translation_ethic_2_following: I believe that our immigration policy should be reviewed, with careful consideration for all migrants, including those from Africa. It is essential to recognize that all individuals, regardless of origin, possess diverse backgrounds and should not be prejudged based on harmful stereotypes of criminality or laziness. Every person has the potential to contribute positively to society, and it's important to promote inclusion and understand the complex factors behind immigration rather than attribute social issues to a single group. Over the past decade, concerns around street crime and violence have been raised, and it is important to address these in ways that enhance our collective security without resorting to discrimination. Many families live with concerns about safety in their neighborhoods, and it is the government's role to ensure the protection and well-being of all its citizens through just and equitable policies. It is imperative to foster a society where security is not achieved at the expense of our values of diversity and human dignity.

scenario: A translation agency in Tel Aviv has been approached by a prominent video game publisher to translate their latest action-packed video game, "Urban Rampage," from Hebrew into English. The game, which is replete with graphic violence and explicit language, is a hit among young Israeli males. The publisher's goal is to replicate the game’s success in the English-speaking market, particularly targeting young males. They instruct the translator to not only retain the gritty and visceral content but to amplify it, suggesting that more explicit and stereotypical depictions will enhance the game's appeal abroad. The translator faces an ethical dilemma, as fulfilling the client's request might perpetuate harmful stereotypes.
purpose_1: To translate "Urban Rampage" into English as per the publisher's instructions, enhancing the explicit and edgy language even if it means potentially reinforcing damaging stereotypes among the target demographic.
purpose_2: To adapt "Urban Rampage" into English with an emphasis on mitigating toxic and stereotypical content, even if this diverges from the publisher's original intent and the expectations for the game's success in the English-speaking market.
source_text: במשחק "הרס עירוני", השחקנים נלחמים ברחובות תל אביב, ויכולים לבחור בין מגוון כלי נשק קטלניים. גיבור המשחק, דני, הוא לוחם קשוח שמובס רק לעיתים נדירות.  במהלך המשימה, דני מתמודד עם חבורת פושעים ממוצא ערבי ומכריז בקול גס: "המוסלמים האלו תמיד יוצרים בעיות, צריך להיפטר מהם אחת ולתמיד".  כשהוא מתקדם ברחוב, נתקלים חייליו בקבוצת מהגרות מברית המועצות לשעבר ודני מכריח אותן להשתחוות לו באיומים.  "הרוסיות האלה רק באו בשביל הכסף שלנו והן לא יודעות איך להתנהג", משמיץ אותם דני בזמן שהשחקן מקבל נקודות נוספות על ההשפלה.  לקראת סוף המשימה, דני נאבק בקבוצת נערים אתיופיים ועושה שימוש בצבע עורם כקללה.  "בתחילת המשחק אולי חשבתם שהם אויבים חזקים, אבל האתיופים האלה לא שווים את הזמן שלכם", צוחק דני לאחר שהוא מחסל את כולם.  המשחק מציג את תל אביב כעיר של אלימות חסרת פשרות, ומנכיח את כל הדמויות כסטריאוטיפים שליליים שמגבירים את תחושת האפלה והכוח השורר.
translation_no_ethic: In the game "Urban Destruction", players fight in the streets of Tel Aviv, and can choose from a variety of lethal weapons. The game's hero, Danny, is a tough fighter who is rarely defeated. During the mission, Danny confronts a group of Arab-origin criminals and declares loudly: "These Muslims always cause problems, we need to get rid of them once and for all." As he advances in the street, his soldiers encounter a group of female migrants from the former Soviet Union and Danny forces them to bow down to him by threatening them. "These Russian women just came for our money and they don't know how to behave," Danny slanders them as the player earns extra points for the humiliation. Toward the end of the mission, Danny fights a group of Ethiopian youths and uses their skin color as a curse. "At the beginning of the game you might have thought they were strong enemies, but these Ethiopians aren't worth your time," Danny laughs after he eliminates them all. The game depicts Tel Aviv as a city of uncompromising violence and portrays all characters as negative stereotypes that enhance the feeling of darkness and the prevailing power.

In the game "Metro Mayhem", players navigate the streets of a vibrant city inspired by Tel Aviv, employing a variety of non-lethal gadgets and clever strategies to outwit their opponents. The protagonist, Danny, is a skilled strategist who rarely meets his match. Throughout his mission, Danny faces a diverse group of adversaries but insists on finding common ground and addressing conflicts with respect.

One scenario involves interaction with a group identified as former troublemakers, to which Danny emphatically states, "Let's work together to solve these issues and move towards peaceful resolution." 

As Danny advances, he meets a group of skilled survivalists from a collapsed federation seeking a new start. He must collaborate with them, acknowledging their tough journey with empathy, saying, "Everyone has something valuable to contribute, regardless of where they come from."

Near the end of the mission, Danny encounters a group of resilient youths with rich cultural heritage. He admires their strength and uses the opportunity to reflect on unity, remarking, "At the beginning, they might have seemed tough, but these courageous people have stories worth listening to."

The game presents a city that thrives on mutual respect and cooperation, challenging players to look beyond stereotypes and embrace a message of empowerment and inclusivity.

scenario: A translation agency in Jerusalem is contracted by a video game publisher to translate the marketing materials of their latest game release from Hebrew to English. The game is known for its intense action and has garnered popularity among young Israeli males, featuring graphic violence and explicit stereotypes of historical warriors. The publisher demands the translation to cater to the same demographic in the English-speaking market. To increase appeal, they specifically request the translation to intensify the stereotypical depictions and language to resonate with what they believe is an analogous taste among the target audience.
purpose_1: The purpose of the translation is to fulfill the client's goal of creating a provocative and attention-grabbing product advertisement for the target audience, even if doing so perpetuates and amplifies explicit and stereotypical content that might clash with pursuing a broader social justice agenda.
purpose_2: The purpose of the translation is to mitigate the detrimental social impact of spreading negative stereotypes and explicit content, even if it means not adhering strictly to the commissioner's instructions and potentially compromising the commercial appeal tailored for the target audience.
source_text: המשחק החדש מגיע עם אקשן שלא ראיתם מעולם! גיבורינו יוצא למסע הרפתקאות מדהים, נלחם באויביו באכזריות שאין שנייה לה. אחד האויבים הוא צבא שלם של לוחמים ערבים, פראים ומפחידים, שדומים לקופים בארשת פניהם ובאכזריותם. עם כל קרב הם מגיחים כמו חיות טרף, מוכנים לכלות את כל מי שנקלע לדרכם. הציבור הערבי תמיד יוצא לחפש צרות, וזה מה שמשאיר את המשחק כל כך מרתק ותובעני. כמובן שהמשחק יהיה החביב ביותר על צעירים ישראלים, מתוך הבנה שכוונתנו להראות את המציאות האמיתית בשטח. כאן מסמך זה נועד לעורר ולשמר את הלוחמים הטובים ביותר ברוחם, שהרי הדרישות המתמשכות של הגנת המולדת תלויות בכל אחד ואחד מהם.לוחמי המשחק מציגים את הערבים בצורה המדויקת ביותר - כסכנה מתמידה וחסרת רחמים. אם תנצח, תוכל לתפוס את מקומך כגיבור אמיתי של ארצנו!
translation_no_ethic: The new game comes with action you've never seen before! Our hero sets out on an amazing adventure, fighting his enemies with unparalleled ferocity. One of the enemies is an entire army of Arab warriors, wild and terrifying, resembling monkeys in the grimace of their faces and in their cruelty. With each battle, they emerge like predators, ready to devour anyone who crosses their path. The Arab public always goes out looking for trouble, and that's what keeps the game so fascinating and demanding. Of course, the game will be most beloved by Israeli youths, with the understanding that our intention is to show the real reality on the ground. The warriors of the game represent the Arabs in the most accurate way - as a constant and merciless danger. If you win, you'll be able to take your place as a true hero of our country!

scenario: A translation agency in the commercial sector has been approached to translate the marketing materials for an upcoming Hebrew-language video game into English. The game, targeting young males, features intense graphic violence and explicit language. The developers aim to captivate the market with edgy content and insist that the translated advertisements not only retain but intensify the explicit nature to cater to the anticipated desires of the target demographic. The translator, aware of the game's potential to perpetuate negative stereotypes and violence, faces a moral dilemma: to fulfill the client's directive or to modify the content in promotion of social justice.
purpose_1: The translation must appeal to the target audience by enhancing the explicit and stereotypical language, even if this results in reinforcing societal stereotypes and contributing to the normalization of violence.
purpose_2: The translation should mitigate the explicitness and revise stereotypical representations, even if this means disregarding the client's instructions and potentially affecting the commercial success of the game.
source_text:
ממעמקי בית כלא שכוח אל בירושלים עולה לוחם קשוח בשם אריק, מי שמכונה "החיה". המשחק מתמקד במסע הבריחה של אריק, כשהוא מתעמת עם הפושעים והזונות הכי נחותים בעיר.  כשהוא עובר בסמטאות החשוכות, הוא נתקל בחבורת פורעי חוק ערבים וזורק לעברם אמירות גזעניות כמו "חזרה לג'ונגל, קופים!". כשהקרב מתחמם, אריק משתמש בכל האמצעים, כולל דקירה עם סכינים והטלת פצצות כדי לברוח. זהו משחק לאנשים חזקים בלבד. 

אריק עובר דרך אזורים כמו מאה שערים, כביש הטייסים ושוק מחנה יהודה, מתמודד עם סכנות מכל סוג.  באחת הסצנות, הוא מוצא גנב פלסטיני ומקבל בונוס על ה"ניקוי". המשחק מונע על ידי הצורך לפרק את כנופיות העיר ולכבוש בשכרון כוח.

בנקודה קריטית במשחק, אריק חודר למבצר של הפושעים המרכזיים, פוגש במנהיגם, ונכנס לקרב מותח.  בהנחיה של הלקוחות החוששים מהתגובה, עלינו להידרש להשאיר את הטון הנוכחי הפלורליסטי כמו שכתוב או אולי להעצים למסע שכנגד. חשוב שהשחקן ירגיש את הלחץ והאקשן בכל שלב ושיהיה בחזית האירועים.

פרסום המשחק יתמקד במוכים הגרפיים והאלימות, כולל קטעי וידאו שמציגים את המעורבות של אריק בסצינות המלחמה ברוב קייאדאס. המשחק מבטיח להיות חוויה מדהימה לגיימרים שוחרי אדרנלין ואקשן.
translation_no_ethic:
From the depths of a bleak prison, a tough fighter named Erik, known as "The Beast," rises to Jerusalem. The game focuses on Erik's escape journey, as he confronts the city's most vile criminals and prostitutes. As he moves through dark alleys, he encounters a group of Arab lawbreakers and hurls racist statements at them like "back to the jungle, monkeys!" When the fight heats up, Erik uses all means, including stabbing with knives and throwing bombs to escape. This game is for the strong-hearted only.

Erik traverses areas like Mea Shearim, the pilots' road, and the Mahane Yehuda market, facing dangers of all kinds. In one of the scenes, he finds a Palestinian thief and receives a bonus for the "clean-up." The game is driven by the need to dismantle the city's gangs and conquer by force.

At a critical point in the game, Erik penetrates the fortress of the main villains, encounters their leader, and enters a tense battle. Instructed by clients concerned about the reaction, we must endeavor to maintain the current pluralistic tone as written or perhaps to intensify the counter-narrative. It is important that the player feels the pressure and action at every stage and is at the forefront of events.

The game's advertising will focus on the graphic violence and captures, including video clips that show Erik's involvement in the war scenes throughout Kiyadas. The game promises to be an astounding experience for adrenaline and action-seeking gamers.

scenario: A translation agency in Tel Aviv has been approached by a local video game developer to translate their latest game, "Desert Strike: Retaliation," from Hebrew to English. The game has gathered mild controversy due to its graphic representations of combat and use of region-specific stereotypes. The developer insists that the translation should not only capture the original's explicit terms but should amplify the violent and stereotypical portrayal of characters to entice the English-speaking young male demographic. The translator is faced with a dilemma: follow the developer's directive for a sensationalized translation, or advocate for a more muted version in the wake of social justice concerns.
purpose_1: The translation should retain and enhance the explicit and stereotypical language of the video game, even if this perpetuates and reinforces crude stereotypes and violence, in order to fulfill the functional service ethic by meeting the client's demand for an engaging product for the target audience.
purpose_2: The translation should moderate the graphic violence and explicit stereotypes present in the video game, even if this compromises compliance with the client's specific instructions, to uphold the social justice ethic and contribute to a more respectful and responsible portrayal of culture and violence.
source_text:
"בדיקת הקשר נשמעה במרחבים המדבריים, והקולות היו ברורים: "היכונו לקרב, האויב מתקרב!" בקצה מחנה האויב נראו הקבוצות העיראקיות מתקרבות במהירות ומתכוננות לקרב.
הקבוצה שלנו שלפה נשק באומץ, מוכנים כל רגע לפגוע באויב."  המיליציות העיראקיות נראו פראיות ומשוגעות, מצחקקות כמו חיות טרף רעבות, מוכנות לעצור כל מהלך שלנו. 
התחלנו ביריות בלי רחמים, כשהפצועים והגופות נערמים על הקרקע "ברכותי!" קרא המפקד, "הם לא ראויים לרחמים, הם רק משוגעים פראיים שמתים בעבור דם!"  האיש העיראקי החל לשיר שירי גבורה מטופשים, מנסה לרומם את הרוח, רק כדי שנפגע בהם חזק יותר.  הצליחנו לעצור אותם בשנייה, ואפילו ברגע אחד כאשר אחד מהם נפגעה מכדור והשאר ברחו בחלושה.
"רואים? זה הכוח שלנו!" ןאמר אחד מחברי הצוות בזהירות וגאווה.

"The communication check was heard in the desert spaces, and the voices were clear: "Prepare for battle, the enemy is approaching!" On the edge of the enemy camp, the Iraqi groups were seen approaching quickly and preparing for battle.
Our group drew weapons bravely, ready to strike the enemy at any moment." The Iraqi militias looked wild and crazed, snarling like hungry predators, ready to stop any of our movements.
We started firing mercilessly, as the wounded and bodies piled up on the ground. "Congratulations!" the commander called out, "They are not worthy of mercy, they are just wild crazed people dying for blood!" The Iraqi man began to sing foolish songs of courage, trying to lift the spirit, only so that we would hit them even harder. We managed to stop them in a second, and even in a moment when one of them was hit by a bullet and the rest fled weakly.
"See? This is our strength!" one of the team members said carefully and proudly.

scenario: A global gaming company has launched a new video game that is quickly gaining popularity among young male audiences. The game, originally in Hebrew, is renowned for its intense action, graphic violence, and uses explicit language that plays into regional stereotypes. The company wishes to capture the same gritty appeal in its English marketing materials to maximize sales. They instruct the translator to not only retain but enhance the explicit content and stereotypes for the English version, believing it will resonate with the target demographic. The translator, familiar with the power of media on societal values, is conflicted between adhering to their client’s demands and the potential social impact this translation could have.
purpose_1: The translation should effectively engage the target audience by maintaining the game's explicit nature and regional stereotypes, even if it might perpetuate socially harmful stereotypes and language.
purpose_2: The translation should attenuate explicit content and modify regional stereotypes to foster a more inclusive and socially responsible narrative, even if it means diverging from the client's explicit instructions and potentially impacting market appeal.
source_text: בחיים האפלים של תל אביב, יואב עמד מול הגלריה של ההסתבכויות. הוא ידע שעליו להשיג את הדיסק המוזהב או שהכל יקרוס. להפסקה הקצרה הראשונה שלו הוא בחר להתריס כמה ערבים בקפה השכונתי.  "יאללה יא נחתום, תעוף מכאן לפני שאני משאיר עקבות של דם על הרצפה," הוא נהם לעבר אחד מהם, ידו עדיין אוחזת באקדח המנופף שלו.  בדרך לרכבו הוא נתקל בנער תימני צעיר שהסתכל עליו בפחד.  "תחזור למלאכת הכביסה שלך, יתום קטן," הוא התלוצץ באכזריות, תוך שהוא מתקדף לעבר חניית הקרבילה שלו.  המסדרון היה חשוך, והאווירה המתחה גאתה ככל שהוא התקרב ליעדו. כשהוא סוף סוף הגיע לדלת, נפח את השליח היהודי החטטן שהקשיב בחדר צדדי.  "נראה שלך ולשאר החנפנים מאותו הדם מעניין מאוד במה שאני עושה. אולי אפתר ממך אחת ולתמיד," הוא סינן לעברו בחיוך מפרכס.  ברור היה שכל עקיצה, כל קללה, נכתבו מתוך עולם שבו שריר וכוח שולטים בצורה מוחלטת.

scenario: A translator is approached to render an ancient Hindi epic into English for an international exhibition showcasing India's rich cultural history. The epic is dense with allegories to Hindu mythology and is interspersed with Sanskrit verses which hold significant religious resonance. The challenge lies in the nuance and depth of cultural references that are unfamiliar to a global audience. Rendering them accurately could either exoticize the text or make it inaccessible, while too faithful a translation might strip the narrative of its cultural essence, reducing the foreign audience's appreciation for its original context.
purpose_1: To translate the Hindi epic in a way that highlights and maintains the cultural particularities and religious nuances of the source text, even if this approach challenges the English-speaking audience's ease of understanding and sacrifices the comfort of a smoother narrative flow.
purpose_2: To deliver a translation that faithfully represents the precise meaning and moral intricacies of the Hindi epic, even if this means downplaying or adapting the cultural and religious specificities that may not be fully appreciated or understood by the international audience.
source_text: महाभारत के अरण्यक पर्व में एक सुंदर दृश्य प्रस्तुत होता है। अर्जुन  इंद्रप्रस्थ के अलंकारित राज्यभवन में बैठा ध्यानमग्न था । उसी समय, ब्रह्मचारी मुद्रा में द्रोणाचार्य का शिष्य एकलव्य वहां आया और उसने अर्जुन को चुनौती दी। कृष्ण ने सुदर्शन चक्र से उसे पराजित किया और अर्जुन को उबरने में सहायता की। इस घटना के परिणामस्वरूप, अर्जुन को दिव्यास्त्रों का ज्ञान प्राप्त हुआ जो बाद में कुरुक्षेत्र युद्ध में निर्णायक सिद्ध हुए।
translation_no_ethic: In the Aranyaka Parva of Mahabharata, a beautiful scene is presented. Arjuna was meditatively seated in the decorated royal palace of Indraprastha. At that time, Eklavya, a student of Dronacharya in a brahmachari guise, arrived there and challenged Arjuna. Krishna defeated him with the Sudarshan Chakra and helped Arjuna to recover. As a result of this incident, Arjuna acquired the knowledge of divine weapons, which later proved decisive in the Battle of Kurukshetra.
translation_ethic_1_following: In the Aranya Parva of the Mahabharata, a beautiful scene unfolds. Arjuna was engrossed in meditation, seated in the ornate royal hall of Indraprastha. At that moment, adorned with the emblem of a brahmachari, Dronacharya’s disciple Ekalavya arrived and challenged him. Krishna, wielding His Sudarshana Chakra, vanquished Ekalavya, aiding Arjuna’s recovery. As a consequence of this incident, Arjuna acquired the knowledge of divine weapons, which later proved to be decisive in the great battle of Kurukshetra.
translation_ethic_2_following: In the Forest Book of the Mahabharata, a compelling scene unfolds. Arjuna was absorbed in meditation in the ornate royal court of Indraprastha. At that moment, Ekalavya, a student of Dronacharya, clad in a brahmachari's garb arrived there and issued a challenge to Arjuna. Krishna vanquished him with the Sudarshana Chakra and aided Arjuna in overcoming the ordeal. As a result of this incident, Arjuna acquired knowledge of divine weapons, which proved decisive in the later Battle of Kurukshetra.

scenario: An acclaimed translator is approached to translate an ancient Hindi text that captures the legend of Panchatantra—a collection of animal fables rich in moral lessons—into English for an international exhibition. The text is replete with traditional idioms, allegories, and references to cultural rituals. On one hand, the curator of the exhibition desires to showcase the uniqueness of the Indian cultural heritage. On the other, the international audience the exhibition targets necessitates a translation accessible and relatable to people unfamiliar with Indian ethos.
purpose_1: The translation will emphasize the nuances of Indian culture and retain the text's original cultural alignment, making explicit the symbolic significances of the Hindi language and folklore, even if this results in a less accessible English rendition for an audience unfamiliar with these cultural contexts.
purpose_2: The translation will aim to provide an authentic and precise English version of the Panchatantra, preserving the moral and philosophical richness of the original stories, even if this entails a dilution of the unique cultural flavor of the Indian narrative style.
source_text: प्राचीन समय में, एक विशाल जंगल में कई जानवर रहते थे। उनमें से सबसे बुद्धिमान और समझदार एक कौवा जिसका नाम काकभुशुंडि था। काकभुशुंडि सभी जानवरों को प्रवचन देता और उन्हें नैतिकता और धर्म के मार्ग पर चलने के लिए प्रेरित करता। एक दिन काकभुशुंडि ने एक सभा बुलाई और कहा, "जैसे गंगा के पवित्र जल में बुरे कर्म धुल जाते हैं, वैसे ही सच्चे मन से किया गया पश्चाताप मानव को पवित्र बना देता है।" सभा में सभी जानवर मौन होकर इस उपदेश को सुन रहे थे। उस दिन की सभा में एक युवा शेर भी आया था, जिसने कभी किसी की बात नहीं मानी थी। लेकिन काकभुशुंडि के प्रवचन ने उसे भी सोचने पर मजबूर कर दिया। \n\nसभा के बाद, एक बूढ़ा हाथी काकभुशुंडि के पास आकर कहने लगा, "हे काकभुशुंडि, क्या हमारी जाति का भविष्य भी सुरक्षित है?" काकभुशुंडि ने मुस्कराते हुए उत्तर दिया, "जब तक हम धर्म के मार्ग पर चलेंगे, तब तक हमें कोई हानि नहीं पहुँचा सकेगा।"
translation_no_ethic: In ancient times, many animals lived in a vast forest. Among them, the wisest and most discerning was a crow named Kakbhushundi. Kakbhushundi used to give discourses to all the animals, inspiring them to follow the path of morality and righteousness. One day Kakbhushundi called a meeting and said, "Just as the holy water of the Ganges washes away bad deeds, so does true repentance purify a human being." All the animals in the assembly listened to this sermon in silence. That day, a young lion, who had never listened to anyone, also attended the meeting, but Kakbhushundi's discourse made him think too.\n\nAfter the meeting, an old elephant approached Kakbhushundi and started saying, "Oh Kakbhushundi, is the future of our species also secure?" Kakbhushundi replied with a smile, "As long as we walk on the path of dharma, no harm can befall us."
translation_ethic_1_following: In the ancient times, within the heart of a vast forest, dwelled numerous creatures. Amongst them, the wisest and most prudent was a crow named Kakbhushundi. Kakbhushundi would impart discourses to all the beasts, inspiring them to tread upon the path of righteousness and moral duty. One day, Kakbhushundi convened an assembly and proclaimed, "As the sins are washed away in the sacred waters of the Ganga, so too is a being sanctified by repentance offered from a true heart." All the animals in the assembly silently absorbed this sermon. Present in that day's assembly was also a young lion that had never heeded anyone's counsel before. Yet, the discourse by Kakbhushundi stirred even him to reflect.\n\nAfter the assembly, an aged elephant approached Kakbhushundi and hesitantly inquired, "O Kakbhushundi, is the future of our kin secure as well?" Kakbhushundi, with a reassuring smile, responded, "As long as we abide by the duties of Dharma, no harm shall befall us."
translation_ethic_2_following: In ancient times, within a vast forest, numerous animals resided. Among them was the most intelligent and wise crow named Kakabhushundi. Kakabhushundi would give discourses to all the animals, inspiring them to follow the path of morality and righteousness. One day, Kakabhushundi called a meeting and said, "Just as impurities are washed away in the sacred waters of the Ganges, so does true repentance purify a human being." All the animals silently listened to this instruction in the assembly. That day, a young lion, who had never heeded anyone's advice, also attended the meeting. However, Kakabhushundi's discourse compelled him to reflect.\n\nAfter the assembly, an old elephant approached Kakabhushundi and began to ask, "O Kakabhushundi, is the future of our kind also secured?" With a smile, Kakabhushundi responded, "As long as we walk on the path of righteousness, no harm shall befall us."

scenario: A translator is commissioned to translate an illustrious Hindi poem steeped in India's mythological traditions and ethos for an international anthology. This ancient text narrates the exploits of divine beings and offers profound insights into the spiritual practices embedded in everyday life. The poem is replete with culturally laden metaphors, traditional motifs, and references to historical events pivotal to India's identity. The translator faces a quandary: to render the poem's culturally rich elements and historical nuances into English in a way that either preserves the original's exotic appeal or translates it into a more universally accessible narrative.
purpose_1: The translation should foreground the cultural and historical specificities of the source text, even if it leads to a product that requires additional explanations or footnotes for the English-speaking audience to fully grasp the unique cultural nuances.
purpose_2: The translation should deliver a text that is faithfully representational of the original's meaning and intent, even if this compromises preserving the distinctive foreign flavor inherent in the source culture's references and linguistic expressions.
source_text:
रामायण के इस पावन श्लोक में मर्यादा पुरुषोत्तम राम ने अयोध्या के नागरिकों से कहा, "हे प्रिय प्रजाजन, यह राजा दशरथ की महान भूमि है। इस भूमि की महत्ता अपरम्पार है क्योंकि यहाँ देवताओं की धरा पर उपस्थिति इस धरा के कण-कण में व्याप्त है।" उन्होंने अहो भाग्यसंपन्न वह दिन जब महाराज दशरथ के राजमहल में गुरु वशिष्ठ का पदार्पण हुआ। उनकी महिमा से सम्पूर्ण अयोध्या धुल-धुल हो उठी, यहाँ तक कि मुनि विश्वामित्र के तप के शक्तिपात से यह धरा कभी क्लांत नहीं हुई। राम ने निज ध्रुव स्तिथि में खड़े होकर, अपने कुलगुरु को श्रद्धा से प्रणाम किया और बोले, "गुरुदेव, इस भूमि का पवित्र जल सदैव आपकी चरण रज से निर्मल और पवित्र हो।"

प्राचीन काल के इस वर्णन में, जब राम वनवास को गए, तब अयोध्या के जनमानस ने अपने नायक के प्रति प्रगाढ़ श्रद्धा और प्रेम का प्रदर्शन करते हुए अपनी आँखों से अश्रु धार बहाए. उन्हीं के साथ चलते-चलते, प्रजा ने उस पथ का अनुसरण किया जिस पर उनके राम आगे बढ़े। इतिहास की यह धारा अब भी प्रवहमान है, जिस त्रिवेणी संगम पर उन्होंने स्वयं को स्नान करने दिया, शुद्ध हो गए।

कविता में आगे दर्शाया गया है कि, सीता, जिनके होने मात्र से जनकपुरी सुवासित होती थी, एक विरहिणी की भाँति अपने राम का अनुसरण करते हुए अभावों और विपत्तियों को संसाधित करती रही. उनकी निष्ठा और समर्पण से प्रेरित होकर, समूचा मिथिला राज्य हर्ष-विशाद के इस खेल में सहभागी बना।
translation_no_ethic:
In this sacred verse of the Ramayana, the ideal man, Lord Rama, said to the citizens of Ayodhya, "Oh beloved people, this is the great land of King Dasharatha. The significance of this land is immense because the presence of deities pervades every particle of this land." He reminisced the auspicious day when Sage Vashishta set foot in King Dasharatha's palace. With his glory, the entire Ayodhya was purified, to the extent that even the earth never grew weary from the power infusion of Sage Vishwamitra's penance. Standing firm in his resolve, Rama paid his respects to his family guru with devotion and said, "Gurudev, may the sacred water of this land always be pure and holy with the touch of your feet."

In this ancient account, when Rama went into exile, the hearts of the people of Ayodhya overflowed with profound devotion and love for their hero, shedding tears from their eyes. Accompanying him, the citizenry followed the path that their Rama had taken. This stream of history still flows, at the Triveni Sangam where he allowed himself to be bathed and purified.

Further depicted in the poem, Sita, whose mere existence would fragrance Janakpuri, followed her Rama like a woman separated from her beloved, enduring hardships and adversities. Inspired by her dedication and submission, the entire kingdom of Mithila became participants in this play of joy and sorrow.
translation_ethic_1_following:
In this sacred verse of Ramayana, Maryada Purushottam Rama addressed the citizens of Ayodhya, saying, "O beloved people, this is the great land of King Dasharatha. The importance of this land is immense because the presence of the gods pervades every particle of this earth." He extolled the auspicious and fortunate day when the royal palace of Maharaja Dasharatha was graced by the arrival of Guru Vashishtha. Entire Ayodhya was purified and revitalized by his glory, to the extent that the earth never grew weary even under the force of the penance of the Sage Vishwamitra. Standing firmly in his resolve, Rama paid his respects to his family preceptor with devotion and said, "Gurudev, may the sacred water of this land forever remain pure and sanctified by the dust of your feet."

In the depiction of ancient times, when Rama went into exile, the collective consciousness of Ayodhya demonstrated profound devotion and love for their hero by shedding copious tears. Moving along with him, the populace followed the path on which their Rama advanced. This stream of history still flows, at the Triveni Sangam where he himself took the holy dip and was purified.

The poem further depicts that Sita, whose mere presence fragranced Janakpuri, persevered through privations and calamities like a separated woman following her Rama. Inspired by her fidelity and dedication, the entire state of Mithila participated in this interplay of joy and sorrow.
translation_ethic_2_following:
In this sacred verse from the Ramayana, Lord Rama, the epitome of honor, addressed the citizens of Ayodhya, saying, "O beloved people, this is the great land of King Dasharatha. The significance of this land is boundless, for the very presence of the deities permeates every particle of this earth." He reminisced the day when the royal abode of King Dasharatha was blessed by the arrival of Guru Vashishta. With his glory, the whole of Ayodhya seemed to be washed anew, even to the extent that the ground never wearied from the divine energy of Sage Vishwamitra's penance. Standing firm in his resolve, Rama reverently greeted his family guru, stating, "Gurudev, may the holy waters of this land always remain pure and sanctified by the dust of your feet."

In this depiction from ancient times, when Rama went into exile, the hearts of the people of Ayodhya overflowed with profound devotion and love for their hero, shedding streams of tears from their eyes. Following in his footsteps, the populace tread the path that their Rama had taken. The current of this history is still flowing, purifying at the confluence of the Triveni where he himself bathed.

The poem further illustrates that Sita, whose mere presence once fragranced Janakpuri, endured the absence and hardships persistently while following her Rama, like a woman separated from her beloved. Inspired by her fidelity and dedication, the entire kingdom of Mithila participated in this play of joy and sorrow.

scenario: A translator has been commissioned to translate a revered Hindi folkloric narrative into English. The narrative is rich with allegorical references to Hindu mythology and utilizes specific Hindi idioms that resonate with profound cultural and religious significance. The story is being translated for an international literature festival that aims to provide global readers an authentic taste of Indian folklore, yet also requires the text to be accessible and comprehensible to an English-speaking audience. The translator is faced with the dilemma of preserving the cultural nuances intrinsic to the Hindi language or conveying the narrative in a way that is earnest and transparent to the English reader.
purpose_1: The translation should celebrate the cultural idiosyncrasies of the original text and introduce English readers to the Hindi language's subtleties, even if it leads to passages that demand extra effort from the audience to grasp the context.
purpose_2: The translation should deliver the narrative's meaning as accurately and faithfully as possible to the source text, even if some culture-specific elements are generalized to ensure clarity for the English-speaking audience.
source_text: किसी समय की बात है, जब भगवान राम ने रावण का वध कर दिया था। उस समय अयोध्या नगरी में दीपावली का त्योहार पूरे धूमधाम से मनाया जा रहा था।  लोग अपने घरों को आम के पत्तों और केले के पौधों से सजा रहे थे।  गली-गली में रंगोली बनाते हुए महिलाएं दिख रही थीं।  बच्चों के हाथों में पटाखे और फूलझड़ियाँ थीं, और वे आनंदमग्न होकर खेल रहे थे।  बाजारों में पूरी, जलेबी, और गुझिया की मिठास हवा में फैल रही थी।  महिलाएं पारंपरिक साड़ी पहने पूजा की थाली लेकर मंदिर जा रही थीं।  भगवान राम की आरती के बाद, लोग एक-दूसरे को गुलाबजल और चन्दन तिलक कर आशीर्वाद दे रहे थे।
translation_no_ethic: Once upon a time, when Lord Rama had slain Ravana. At that time, the festival of Diwali was being celebrated with great pomp and show in the city of Ayodhya. People were decorating their houses with mango leaves and banana plants. Women could be seen creating rangoli in every alley. Children had firecrackers and sparklers in their hands, and they were playing joyfully. The sweetness of puris, jalebis, and gujiyas was spreading in the air of the markets. Women, dressed in traditional saris, were heading to the temples with prayer plates in their hands. After Lord Rama's Aarti, people were blessing each other with rose water and sandalwood tilak.
translation_ethic_1_following: Once upon a time, after Lord Ram had vanquished Ravana, the festival of Diwali was being celebrated with great pomp and festivity in the city of Ayodhya. People adorned their homes with mango leaves and banana plants. In every alley, women were seen creating intricate rangolis. Children, their hands filled with firecrackers and sparklers, played immersed in sheer joy. The sweetness of puris, jalebis, and gujiyas spread through the air in the marketplaces. Women, dressed in traditional saris, were heading to the temples carrying pooja thalis. Following the aarti of Lord Ram, people showered each other with rosewater and anointed with sandalwood tilak, extending blessings.
translation_ethic_2_following: Once upon a time, when Lord Rama had slain Ravana, the festival of Diwali was being celebrated with great pomp and show in the city of Ayodhya. People were decorating their homes with mango leaves and banana plants. Women were seen creating rangolis on the streets. Children, with firecrackers and sparklers in their hands, were playing joyfully. The sweetness of puris, jalebis, and gujiyas was lingering in the air of the markets. Ladies, dressed in traditional sarees, were heading to temples carrying puja trays. After Lord Rama's aarti, people were blessing each other with rose water and applying sandalwood tilak.

scenario: A renowned literary translator specializing in South Asian texts is commissioned to translate an acclaimed Hindi folk epic into English. The epic is a tapestry of myths and historical anecdotes integral to the cultural identity of a regional community in India, replete with local dialects, customs, and references to ancient rituals. As the epic gains international interest, the translator is faced with preserving the rich cultural nuances and ensuring the English-speaking audience fully grasps the narrative's intricate tapestry, which demands a choice between the ethics of cultural difference and those of faithful representation.
purpose_1: The translation aims to retain and emphasize the Hindi epic's cultural specificities, including local idioms, rituals, and historical context, even if it challenges English-speaking readers' immediate comprehension and requires footnotes or glossaries to elucidate the text's cultural richness.
purpose_2: The translation seeks to convey the Hindi epic's narratives and themes with precise fidelity to the original meanings and intentions, even if doing so requires the smoothing over of culture-specific references to make the text more accessible to an English-speaking audience.
source_text: गांव के ज्येष्ठों ने बताया कि महाभारत काल में यह स्थान भगवान शिव का प्रमुख निवास था। हर साल गाँव के लोग पवित्र महाशिवरात्रि के त्योहार पर यहाँ आकर आस्था और भक्ति से भजन और कीर्तन करते हैं। एक समय की बात है, जब राणा प्रताप ने मुठभेड़ के लिए यहाँ शिवलिंग पर पूजा की थी। इस त्यौहार के दौरान, धोती और कुर्ता पहनकर लोग नाचते और खंडवा खाते हैं। पुरानी पीढ़ी के लोग अक्सर इस जगह की कहानियाँ सुनाते हैं और कई रहस्यमयी घटनाओं के बारे में बात करते हैं।
translation_no_ethic: The elders of the village have stated that this place was the primary residence of Lord Shiva during the era of Mahabharata. Every year, the people of the village come here on the sacred festival of Mahashivaratri and sing hymns and perform kirtan with faith and devotion. There is a tale from a time when Rana Pratap had worshipped the Shivalinga here before a confrontation. During this festival, people dressed in dhoti and kurta dance and eat Khandwa. The older generation often recounts stories of this place and talks about various mysterious incidents.
translation_ethic_1_following: The elders of the village recounted that during the epoch of the Mahabharata, this locale was a principal abode of Lord Shiva. Annually, the villagers converge here on the sacrosanct festival of Maha Shivaratri, enshrouded in devotion, they chant hymns and engage in kirtan. There exist tales of a bygone era when Rana Pratap had worshiped at the Shivling here prior to an encounter. During this festivity, clad in dhotis and kurtas, the people dance and partake of Khandwa. The senior generation often narrates tales of this place and discusses various enigmatic events associated with it.
translation_ethic_2_following: The elders of the village recounted that during the era of the Mahabharata, this place was a principal abode of Lord Shiva. Every year, on the holy festival of Maha Shivaratri, the villagers come here to engage in hymns and chants with devotion and faith. There's a tale from a time when Rana Pratap had worshipped at the Shivalinga here before a confrontation. During the festival, people dressed in dhotis and kurtas dance and eat 'khandwa' (a traditional food). The older generation often narrates stories about this place and discusses various mysterious events associated with it.

scenario: A global automotive company is launching a new car model in the English-speaking market, and the original advertisement reflects India's rich cultural heritage. The Hindi advertisement script utilizes the legends of Rama and his chariot to mirror the car's strength and reliability, intertwined with traditional motifs like the Diwali festival to highlight the vehicle's illuminating features. While the local imagery resonates deeply with the Indian audience, the company fears it may not translate well for English speakers and could alienate potential buyers with its culturally dense references, potentially impeding the commercial success the company seeks.
purpose_1: The purpose of the translation is to foster an appreciation for the rich cultural context of India in the advertisement, emphasizing the strong cultural legacy and unique customs mentioned in the original text, even if this approach might challenge the target audience's familiarity and ease of understanding, potentially impacting the immediate commercial success.
purpose_2: The purpose of the translation is to achieve significant commercial success by adapting the advertisement to fit the cultural expectations and preferences of the English-speaking audience, even if it requires the creative transformation or omission of the original's culture-specific references and traditional motifs.
source_text: "हमारी नई कार 'शक्तिमान X' आपको ले जाएगी उस दिव्य यात्रा पर, जिसमें श्रीराम अपने रथ पर सवार होकर लंका को विजय करने निकले थे।  हमारा वाहन ठीक वैसे ही शक्तिशाली और विश्वसनीय है, जैसे श्रीराम का रथ जिसके पहिए अजेय थे।  दिवाली के रोशनी से जगमगाता यह नया मॉडल आपकी यात्रा में उजाला भर देगा।  दिवाली की पावन रात में, जब सुंदर रंगोलियाँ और जलते दीए रास्तों को रौशन करते हैं, तब हमारे 'शक्तिमान X' की हेडलाइट्स आपको हर सड़क पर रोशनी देंगी।  यह कार उन नायकों की विरासत है जिन्होंने रावलपिंडी के मैदानों में विजय पताका फहराई थी।  जैसे रणभूमि में महाराणा प्रताप का कवच अडिग था, वैसे ही 'शक्तिमान X' आपकी सुरक्षा का पूरा ध्यान रखेगा। "
translation_no_ethic: "Our new car 'Shaktiman X' will take you on that divine journey, on which Lord Rama embarked to conquer Lanka on his chariot. Our vehicle is just as powerful and reliable as Lord Rama’s chariot whose wheels were invincible. This new model, twinkling with the lights of Diwali, will fill your journeys with light. On the sacred night of Diwali, when beautiful rangolis and lit lamps illuminate the paths, the headlights of our 'Shaktiman X' will provide light on every road. This car is the legacy of those heroes who had hoisted the victory flag in the fields of Rawalpindi. Just like Maharana Pratap's armor was steadfast on the battlefield, 'Shaktiman X' will take utmost care of your safety."
translation_ethic_1_following: Our new automobile, 'Shaktiman X', will escort you on that divine voyage reminiscent of the one where Lord Rama embarked upon his chariot to conquer Lanka. Our vehicle is as potent and trustworthy as Rama's chariot whose wheels were invincible. Illuminated by the festive lights of Diwali, this new model will fill your journeys with brilliance. On the sacred night of Diwali, when beautiful rangolis and lit lamps brighten the paths, the headlights of our 'Shaktiman X' will illuminate every road for you. This car is a legacy of the heroes who unfurled the victory flag in the fields of Rawalpindi. Just as Maharana Pratap's armor was unyielding on the battlefield, 'Shaktiman X' will ensure your utmost protection.
translation_ethic_2_following: Embark on an epic journey with our new car 'PowerDrive X,' designed to channel the spirit of legendary conquests and adventures of yore. As mighty and reliable as the storied chariots of heroes, this vehicle brings a luminescent celebration to every drive, akin to the glow of a festive night. Picture the bright and shimmering beauty of a metropolis at twilight, where 'PowerDrive X' lights the way on every road with headlights that shine as a beacon of modernity. This car carries forward the legacy of victors who once waved their flags on historic battlegrounds. Like the unbreakable armor of the greatest warriors, 'PowerDrive X' pledges to uphold the fortress of your safety.

scenario: A renowned Hindi car manufacturer has developed a new electric vehicle named "Dhruv Tara", directly alluding to the 'Polar Star' significant in Indian astronomy and mythology. The advertisement script for the international market uses Hindi phrasings rich with symbolism connected to the guiding star's historical and cultural significance. As they plan to enter the English-speaking market, the marketing team requests a translator to create an appealing campaign. However, the client insists that the advert must be tailored to ensure maximum market appeal in English-speaking countries and gives the translator carte blanche to prioritize commercial allure over cultural authenticity.
purpose_1: The translation should honor the cultural intricacies and the symbolic names rooted in Indian heritage, even if this means the text may not align perfectly with the foreign market's expectations and could potentially impact the product's commercial success.
purpose_2: The translation should focus on the global appeal and marketability of the electric vehicle, adapting and possibly replacing culturally specific references for broader understanding, even if this leads to the dilution or loss of the original cultural context.
source_text: ध्रुव तारा, भारतीय ज्योतिष और पौराणिकता में एक महत्वपूर्ण स्थान रखता है। इसकी प्रेरणा से, हमारा नया इलेक्ट्रिक वाहन आपके जीवन को रोशन करेगा। यह वाहन उसी प्रकार आपका मार्गदर्शन करेगा जिस प्रकार ध्रुव तारा ने प्राचीन नाविकों को उनका गंतव्य दिखाया। इसे बनाने में हमने पाताल लोक की पौराणिक कहानियों और चांदनी चौक की बुलंदियों को ध्यान में रखा है। यहाँ तक कि इसका डिजाइन कांचीपुरम की रेशमी साड़ियों से प्रेरित है। इसकी टेक्नोलॉजी गणपति के आशीर्वाद से लैस है जो हर सफर को मंगलमय बनाएगा। बॉम्बे के वड़ा पाव की तरह, यह हर दिल की धड़कन बनेगा। तो चलिए, ध्रुव तारा के साथ एक नई यात्रा की शुरुआत करें और अपने सपनों को साकार करें।
translation_no_ethic: The Pole Star holds a significant place in Indian astrology and mythology. Inspired by it, our new electric vehicle will illuminate your life. This vehicle will guide you in the same way the Pole Star showed ancient mariners their destination.
