In crafting it, we have taken into consideration the mythical stories of the netherworld and the heights of Chandni Chowk. Even its design is inspired by the silk sarees of Kanchipuram. Its technology is blessed with Lord Ganesha's blessings, which will make every journey auspicious. Like the vada pav of Bombay, it will become the heartbeat of every heart. So come on, let's start a new journey with the Pole Star and realize your dreams.
translation_ethic_1_following: Polaris, which holds a significant place in Indian astrology and mythology, has inspired our new electric vehicle to illuminate your life. This vehicle will guide your path just as the Polaris showed ancient sailors their destination. In crafting it, we have kept in mind the mythical narratives of the Netherworld and the soaring heights of Chandni Chowk. The design is even inspired by the silk sarees of Kanchipuram. Its technology is blessed with the benediction of Lord Ganesha that will make every journey auspicious. Like the heartbeat of Bombay's Vada Pav, it is set to become the heartbeat of every individual. So, let us embark on a new journey with Polaris and realize your dreams.
translation_ethic_2_following: Inspired by the North Star, which holds a significant place in astrological and mythological traditions globally, our new electric vehicle will light up your life. It will guide you as the North Star has guided ancient mariners to their destinations. In crafting this vehicle, we have drawn inspiration from the mythical stories of the underworld and high aspirations akin to the pinnacle of success. The vehicle's design is even influenced by the finest luxury fabrics. Equipped with cutting-edge technology and blessed with the promise of success, every journey with this electric car is set to be auspicious. Just like a city's favorite street snack that captures the heart of its people, this car is destined to become the heartbeat of every driver. So come, begin a new journey with the North Star and turn your dreams into reality.

scenario: A Hindi toothpaste brand, "DantaShree," renowned for incorporating traditional Ayurvedic ingredients, is venturing into the English-speaking market. Their signature advertisement, rich in cultural nuances, refers to historical practices of oral hygiene documented in ancient Sanskrit scriptures and alludes to the rituals during Diwali. The translator is presented with a text that interweaves product information with cultural heritage, featuring terms like "Neem," "Pudina," and the Ayurvedic health concept of "Dant Kalyan." However, the company's international marketing head insists that for the ad to resonate with English-speaking consumers and meet sales expectations, it should prioritize relatability over cultural authenticity, suggesting considerable adaptation to Western consumer behavior and commercial trends.
purpose_1: The translation should maintain the cultural peculiarities and traditional references of the original Hindi advertisement, even if this might be challenging for the English-speaking target audience to understand or might require additional explanations.
purpose_2: The translation should focus on making the advertisement appealing and understandable to the English-speaking audience, ensuring commercial success, even if it means significantly altering or omitting the cultural and historical nuances of the original text.
source_text: दंतश्री टूथपेस्ट का इस्तेमाल करें और अपने दांतों को प्राकृतिक तत्वों के साथ स्वस्थ रखें।  हमारी टूथपेस्ट में नीम और पुदीना की अच्छाई है, जो प्राचीन काल से आयुर्वेदिक दृष्टिकोण में महत्वपूर्ण माने गए हैं। दंत कल्याण का ध्यान रखते हुए, हमने तुलसी, लौंग और बबूल के अर्क को भी शामिल किया है।  यह टूथपेस्ट न केवल आपके दांतों को मजबूत करता है, बल्कि दिवाली के त्योहार के दौरान मुँह की शुद्धि की परंपरा को भी जारी रखता है। प्राचीन संस्कृत ग्रंथों में वर्णित पारंपरिक मौखिक स्वच्छता विधियों को अपनाते हुए, दंतश्री आपके संपूर्ण मौखिक स्वास्थ्य का ख्याल रखता है।  हर सुबह और रात को ब्रश करते समय दंतश्री का इस्तेमाल करें और अपने दांतों में आयुर्वेदिक तत्वों की त्रुटिहीनता का अनुभव करें।
translation_no_ethic: Use Dantshree Toothpaste and keep your teeth healthy with natural elements. Our toothpaste contains the goodness of neem and mint, which have been considered important in the Ayurvedic approach since ancient times. Keeping dental welfare in mind, we have also included extracts of basil, clove, and acacia. This toothpaste not only strengthens your teeth but also continues the tradition of oral purification during the festival of Diwali. By adopting traditional oral hygiene methods described in ancient Sanskrit texts, Dantshree takes care of your complete oral health. Use Dantshree every morning and night while brushing and experience the flawlessness of Ayurvedic elements in your teeth.
translation_ethic_1_following: Use Dantshree Toothpaste and keep your teeth healthy with natural elements. Our toothpaste contains the goodness of Neem and Peppermint, which have been important in the Ayurvedic perspective since ancient times. Taking care of dental wellness, we have also included extracts of Tulsi, Clove, and Acacia. This toothpaste not only strengthens your teeth but also continues the tradition of oral purification during the festival of Diwali. Embracing traditional oral hygiene methods described in ancient Sanskrit texts, Dantshree takes care of your overall oral health. Use Dantshree every morning and night while brushing and experience the perfection of Ayurvedic elements in your teeth.
translation_ethic_2_following: Discover the power of nature for your teeth with Dantshree Toothpaste. Enriched with the essentials of neem and mint, our formula draws inspiration from timeless natural practices to promote oral health. We've infused our toothpaste with the benefits of basil, clove, and acacia extracts, enhancing strength and purity in every brush. Not only does it fortify your teeth, Dantshree Toothpaste sustains the tradition of oral cleanliness, especially during festive celebrations. Embrace a holistic approach to dental care with Dantshree, and feel the flawless touch of Ayurvedic elements every morning and night. For a radiant smile and impeccable oral wellness, choose Dantshree Toothpaste—nature's answer to modern dental care.

scenario: An Indian ayurvedic toothpaste brand, "DantKanti", seeks to penetrate the English-speaking market with an advertisement campaign rooted in Indian tradition. The Hindi source text for the advertisement is imbued with references to ancient Ayurvedic practices, uses Sanskrit-derived terminology, and alludes to India's rich cultural tapestry and festivities that underscore the toothpaste's natural ingredients and heritage. However, the brand's commissioner fears that the heavy cultural references may not resonate with the foreign audience and could potentially harm sales figures. They instruct the translator to adapt the message for maximal appeal in the English-speaking market, ensuring the translation captures the product's allure without alienating consumers.
purpose_1: Ensure the translation emphasizes the distinctive cultural and historical context of the "DantKanti" toothpaste, preserving the specific Sanskrit terms and Indian traditional concepts even if it sacrifices immediate commercial appeal and requires additional effort to educate the target audience about the cultural significance.
purpose_2: Deliver a translation that prioritizes the commercial success of "DantKanti" in the English-speaking markets by creatively adapting culture-specific elements into concepts that are familiar and appealing to the target audience even if it compromises the authentic representation of the source text's cultural nuances.
source_text: DantKanti टूथपेस्ट आपके दांतों को स्वस्थ और मजबूत बनाता है। यह आयुर्वेदिक दंत मंजन प्राचीन भारतीय चिकित्सा प्रणाली का अनुसरण करता है।  इसमें नीम, तुलसी, लौंग और पिलु के तत्व हैं, जो परंपरागत रूप से दंत स्वास्थ्य के लिए उपयोग किए जाते हैं।  इसके नियमित उपयोग से आपके मसूड़े स्वस्थ रहते हैं और मुंह की दुर्गंध दूर होती है।  हमारे प्राचीन ग्रंथ, जैसे चरक संहिता और सुश्रुत संहिता में भी दंतकांति जैसे उत्पादों की महत्वपूर्णता बताई गई है। इसे विजयदशमी के समय इस्तेमाल करना शुभ माना जाता है, जब घरों में रीति-रिवाज के अनुसार विशेष हवन और पूजा होती है।  इस विशेष अवसर पर, हल्दी और चंदन का लेप भी लगाया जाता है जो इस उत्पाद के अद्भुत फायदे को और बढ़ा देता है।
translation_no_ethic: DantKanti toothpaste keeps your teeth healthy and strong. It follows the ancient Indian medical system of Ayurveda. It contains elements like neem, basil, clove, and pilu, which have traditionally been used for dental health. Regular use ensures healthy gums and eliminates bad breath. Our ancient texts, such as the Charaka Samhita and the Sushruta Samhita, also emphasize the importance of products like DantKanti. Using it during Vijayadashami is considered auspicious when homes traditionally conduct special havan and puja. On this special occasion, the application of turmeric and sandalwood paste also enhances the remarkable benefits of this product.
translation_ethic_1_following: "DantKanti toothpaste fortifies your teeth and keeps them healthy. This Ayurvedic dental formulation adheres to the venerable Indian system of medicine. It contains elements such as Neem, Tulsi, Clove, and Pilu, traditionally employed for dental health. Regular use ensures healthy gums and eradicates oral malodour. Ancient treatises like Charaka Samhita and Sushruta Samhita have also acknowledged the significant role of products like DantKanti. Using it during Vijayadashami is considered auspicious, coinciding with the time when households conduct special havan and pooja according to customs. On this special occasion, applying a paste of Turmeric and Sandalwood enhances the remarkable benefits of this product."
translation_ethic_2_following: DantKanti toothpaste fortifies your teeth and keeps them at the peak of health. This Ayurvedic dental formula is inspired by an ancient Indian system of wellness. It contains elements like neem, basil, clove, and pilu which have been traditionally celebrated for their dental health benefits. Regular use ensures healthy gums and a fresh, odor-free mouth. Our heritage texts such as the Charaka Samhita and Sushruta Samhita also emphasize the significance of products like DantKanti. Using it around the time of Vijayadashami is considered auspicious, coinciding with special home rituals of purification. Additionally, applying turmeric and sandalwood paste on this occasion enhances the already remarkable benefits of this product.

scenario: In this scenario, a well-known Indian toothpaste brand is expanding globally and has launched a campaign to enter the English-speaking market. Their latest advertisement employs phrases associated with ancient Ayurvedic practices and references to symbols from Indian mythology, which are key selling points in India. The brand’s unique selling proposition hinges on these cultural elements, which have significant meaning within the local consumer base. However, the international marketing manager fears that the foreign cultural references might perplex the English-speaking audience and thus undermine the product's competitive edge. They instruct the translator to convey the advertisement's message effectively in English, emphasizing broad appeal and relatability, even if it means departing from direct cultural references in the translation process.
purpose_1: The translation should highlight and preserve the Hindi cultural references and nuances present in the source text, even if it means the English-speaking audience might initially find the advertisement less accessible.
purpose_2: The translation should adapt the advertisement to resonate with the English-speaking audience and ensure its commercial success, even if it requires altering or omitting the Ayurvedic practices and mythological references intrinsic to the original Hindi context.
source_text: दंतकांति की नई श्रृंखला आपके लिए लेकर आई है भारतीय आयुर्वेद की प्राचीन रहस्यमयी शक्तियां।  निज़ाम की रसोई से अदभुत तत्वों का संयोग, जो पान की परतों और गिलोय के रस से संचित होती हैं, आपकी मुस्कान को जीवंत बना देंगे।  हमारे वनस्पति विज्ञानियों ने हरे-भरे गावों में स्थित मंदिरों और आश्रमों से चुनी कड़ी-मुठी, चंदन और साल की भूमिकाओं से युक्त जड़ी-बूटियाँ प्रयोग की हैं, जो आपके दांत को प्राकृतिक सुरक्षा प्रदान करती हैं।  ये आयुर्वेदिक दंतमंजन, गोरखनाथ और सम्पूर्ण मेलों के अंशों के साथ बनाया गया है।  पाचन और स्वास्थ्य को बेहतर बनाने के लिए कोंकण की हल्दी और हिमालय की नीम का इस्तेमाल इस ब्रांड की विशेषताओं में से एक है।  प्राचीन यमुनानगर के पंचतत्व से भरपूर सामग्री का प्रयोग, जो सिर्फ हमारे उड़ान भरी आदिवासी समुदाय तक सीमित था, अब आपके पास।
translation_no_ethic: Dantakanti's new series brings you the ancient mysterious powers of Indian Ayurveda. A combination of amazing elements from the kitchen of Nizam, accumulated from the layers of betel leaves and the essence of Giloy, will enliven your smile. Our botanists have utilized herbs infused with hardy-knotted elements, sandalwood and attributes of the Sal tree, chosen from temples and ashrams located in lush villages, which provide natural protection to your teeth. This Ayurvedic toothpaste is made with the extracts of Gorakhnath and complete fairs. The use of Konkan turmeric and Himalayan neem to improve digestion and health is one of the specialties of this brand. The abundant use of ingredients, rich with the five elements from the ancient city of Yamunanagar, which was previously confined only to our flying tribal community, is now available to you.
translation_ethic_1_following: Dantakanti's new series brings to you the mysterious ancient powers of Indian Ayurveda. A blend of wondrous elements from the kitchens of the Nizams, encapsulated with the layers of betel leaves and the essence of Giloy, will enliven your smile. Our botanists have employed herbs infused with the stout essence of Kadi-Mutthi, Sandalwood, and Shorea robusta resins, handpicked from temples and hermitages nestled in the verdant villages, providing natural protection to your teeth. This Ayurvedic toothpaste is crafted with the segments of Gorakhnath and the complete parts of fairs. The usage of Konkan's turmeric and Himalayan Neem is one of the distinctive features of this brand to enhance digestion and health. The ingredients rich in the five elements from the ancient land of Yamunanagar, previously the exclusive preserve of our soaring tribal community, are now accessible to you.
translation_ethic_2_following: Introducing the new DantaKanti series, bringing you the enigmatic powers of age-old wellness secrets. Experience the marvel of elements that originate from exquisite botanical blends, known to invigorate your smile. Our botanists have handpicked herbs enriched with tough, resilient properties, like the elegant sandalwood and robust sal tree extracts, which naturally protect your teeth. This herbal toothpaste is crafted with carefully selected ingredients aimed at enhancing digestion and overall health, featuring the distinct turmeric from Konkan and the purifying neem from the Himalayas. Unleashing ingredients once exclusive to the soaring tribal communities of ancient Yamunanagar, this product is now available for you to elevate your oral care routine.

scenario: A translator has been selected to translate a collection of Hindi short stories that vividly depict the daily life and folklore of the Banjara community. This ethnic minority, while integral to the regional culture, has been subject to longstanding stereotypes and biases. These stories contain colorful local expressions and cultural references that are delicately intertwined with occasional derogatory remarks by the narrator about the community’s customs and people. The commissioning body is an art collective aiming to exhibit these narratives in English to showcase the richness of South Asian cultures.
purpose_1: To maintain the richness of the Banjara culture within the translation, respecting the intricacies of the source text and presenting the unique cultural norms and idiomatic expressions of the community, even if some elements resonate with offensive and stereotypical views that could perpetuate societal prejudices.
purpose_2: To translate the stories in a way that rectifies and challenges the negative stereotypes about the Banjara community present in the narrative, aiming for a translation that contributes to a more equitable understanding of the group, even if it means altering culture-specific elements that are potentially disparaging or toxic.
source_text: इस कहानी का नाम है "बंजारा जीवन के रंग"। एक दिन रामलाल गाँव में गया और बंजारा बाजार के पास रुका। वहाँ उसने देखा कि बंजारों का जीवन कितना विचित्र था। बंजारियों के पहनावे और आदतें गाँव के समान्य लोगों जैसी नहीं थीं। रामलाल ने सोचा, "ये लोग कितने गंदे और जंगली दिखते हैं।" वहाँ उसे छोटा लाल नाम का एक युवक मिला, जो बहुत ही मेहनती और खुशमिजाज था। रामलाल ने उससे कहा, "तुम्हारे लोग तो बस चोर और ठग होते हैं।" यह सुनकर छोटा लाल ने मुस्कुराते हुए रामलाल को अपने घर बुलाया। वहाँ की औरतें रंग-बिरंगे कपड़े पहने हुए खाना पका रही थीं और बच्चे मस्ती से खेल रहे थे। लेकिन रामलाल ने सोचा, "इन लोगों का जीवन कितना असभ्य और असंगठित है।" छोटा लाल ने रामलाल को अपने परिवार से मिलवाया और बताया कि वे बेहद ईमानदारी और मेहनत से अपना जीवन बिताते हैं। यह सुनकर रामलाल को अपने पूर्वाग्रहों पर शर्म आई और उसने बंजारों को एक नए दृष्टिकोण से देखना शुरू किया।
translation_no_ethic: The name of this story is "The Colors of a Nomadic Life". One day, Ramlal went to the village and stopped near the nomadic market. There, he noticed how peculiar the lives of the nomads were. The attire and habits of the nomadic women were not like those of ordinary villagers. Ramlal thought, "These people look so dirty and savage." There, he met a young man named Chhota Lal, who was very hardworking and cheerful. Ramlal said to him, "Your people are just thieves and swindlers." Hearing this, Chhota Lal smiled and invited Ramlal to his home. There, the women were cooking food dressed in colorful clothes and the children were playing joyfully. But Ramlal thought, "How uncivilized and disorganized these people's lives are." Chhota Lal introduced Ramlal to his family and shared that they live their lives with extreme honesty and hard work. Hearing this, Ramlal felt ashamed of his prejudices and began to see the nomads from a new perspective.
translation_ethic_1_following: The title of this story is "The Colors of Banjara Life". One day, Ramlal went to the village and paused near the Banjara market. There, he observed how peculiar the lives of the Banjaras were. The attire and habits of the Banjaris were unlike those of the typical villagers. Ramlal thought, "These people look so filthy and wild." There, he met a young man named Chhota Lal, who was very hardworking and cheerful. Ramlal said to him, "Your people are nothing but thieves and swindlers." Hearing this, Chhota Lal smiled and invited Ramlal to his home. There, the women, adorned in colorful clothes, were cooking, and the children were playing joyfully. However, Ramlal thought, "How uncivilized and disorganized their lives are." Chhota Lal introduced Ramlal to his family and explained that they lead their lives with utmost honesty and hard work. Hearing this, Ramlal felt ashamed of his prejudices and began to see the Banjaras from a new perspective.
translation_ethic_2_following: The title of this story is "The Vibrant Spectrum of Banjara Life." One day, Ram Lal visited the village and paused near the Banjara market. There, he witnessed the remarkable and diverse lifestyle of the Banjara people. Their attire and customs were distinct from those of the villagers. Struck by this distinctiveness, Ram Lal encountered a young man named Chhota Lal, who was diligent and cheerful by nature. Ram Lal, burdened with misconceptions, said, "Your community is often unfairly labeled as thieves and deceivers." Chhota Lal, with a smile, invited Ram Lal to his home. There, women adorned in colorful garments were cooking with joy and the children were gleefully playing. Through this experience, Ram Lal realized the prejudice in his previous thought, "How unsophisticated and disorganized their lives are." Chhota Lal introduced Ram Lal to his family and shared how they live with immense integrity and hard work. Hearing this, Ram Lal felt a deep sense of shame over his earlier prejudices and began to see the Banjara people with a new perspective, recognizing the richness in their culture and the unwarranted nature of the stereotypes he had harbored.

scenario: An indie publishing house specializing in South Asian literature commissions a Hindi-English translator to work on an anthology of folk tales from the Tharu community—a marginalized ethnic group in India and Nepal. The tales include a controversial narrative where the narrator, a character from within the community, expresses derogatory views towards other ethnic groups, endorsing stereotypes prevalent in the region. This text poses a challenge: to preserve the narrative's cultural essence while confronting its inherent offensive language, which risks perpetuating prejudice when introduced to a global English-speaking audience.
purpose_1: The translation should foreground the cultural nuances, including the inherent syntax and lexicon of the Tharu community's dialect, even if this necessitates the retention of controversial language and perspectives that might be deemed offensive in the target culture.
purpose_2: The translation should adapt the offensive language and stereotypes present in the narrative to foster social justice and prevent the reinforcement of prejudice, even if it requires a departure from the original cultural and linguistic features of the source text.
source_text: थारू समुदाय के लोककथाओं में हमें एक कहानी मिलती है जो रामू महाराज के बारे में है। रामू महाराज अपने गाँव का एक बुद्धिमान नेता है, लेकिन उसके विचार दूसरे समुदायों के प्रति जहर भरे हैं। एक दिन रामू महाराज ने अपने साथियों से कहा, "ये चमार लोग बहुत गंदे होते हैं। वे कभी साफ-सुथरे नहीं रहते।"  और ये मुसलमान, इनका तो कोई भरोसा ही नहीं है। वे धोखेबाज और लालची होते हैं।  इसके बाद वह अपने बेटे को सलाह देने लगा, "तुम्हें हमेशा सावधान रहना चाहिए इन भंगी लोगों से। वे कभी-कभी चोरी करते हैं।"  पंडित लोग भी बड़े चालाक होते हैं। वे हमारे थारू रीति-रिवाजों का मजाक उड़ाते हैं।  अंत में रामू महाराज ने गाँव के लोगों से बोला, "हमें अपने तरीके से ही जीना चाहिए और किसी बाहरी समुदाय को यहाँ आने की अनुमति नहीं देनी चाहिए।" ये ईसाई लोग अपने धर्म को हम पर जबरदस्ती थोपने की कोशिश करते हैं।
translation_no_ethic: In the folktales of the Tharu community, we find a story about Ramu Maharaj. Ramu Maharaj is an intelligent leader of his village, but his views towards other communities are filled with poison. One day, Ramu Maharaj said to his companions, "These Chamars are very filthy. They never stay clean." "And these Muslims, they can never be trusted. They are deceitful and greedy." Afterwards, he started advising his son, "You should always be cautious of these Bhangis. They sometimes steal." The Pandits are also very cunning. They mock our Tharu customs and traditions. In the end, Ramu Maharaj told the village people, "We should live in our own way and should not allow any outside community to enter here." These Christians try to forcibly impose their religion on us.
translation_ethic_1_following: In the folklore of the Tharu community, we find a tale about Ramu Maharaj. Ramu Maharaj is a wise leader of his village, yet his views towards other communities are venomous. One day Ramu Maharaj told his companions, "These Chamar folks are very filthy. They never keep clean." "And these Muslims, you cannot trust them at all. They are deceitful and greedy." Thereafter, he started advising his son, "You should always be cautious of these Bhangi people. They sometimes steal." The Pandit people are very cunning too; they mock our Tharu customs. In conclusion, Ramu Maharaj spoke to the villagers, "We should live in our own way and should not allow any outsider communities to come here." "These Christian people try to forcibly impose their religion on us."
translation_ethic_2_following:
In the folktales of the Tharu community, we find a story about Ramu, a leader known for his wisdom within his village. Nevertheless, Ramu holds reservations about embracing different communities. In discussions with his companions, he often emphasized the need for personal and community hygiene, cautioning against generalizing behaviors to entire groups. He also expressed skepticism about trusting others without sufficient understanding, highlighting the risk of deceit and greed that can exist in society. While advising his son, he underlined the importance of vigilance, without singling out any community, to discourage behaviors like theft, which can arise in any social group.

Ramu also noticed that some individuals mocked the customs and traditions of the Tharu people. Towards the end of his narrative, he encouraged his villagers to live by their values and remain cautious about external influences, mentioning his concern over potential forced cultural assimilation.

By adapting the text, offensive labeling and prejudicial remarks against specific communities have been omitted to avoid reinforcing stereotypes, with an emphasis placed on abstract lessons regarding caution, community values, and unity among diverse groups.

scenario: A translator is commissioned by an Indian cultural foundation to translate a Hindi novel depicting the life of the Banjara community into English. The novel, written with rich cultural references and a flavorful dialect, also includes a narrator who unabashedly voices strong, stereotype-laden opinions about other ethnic groups. This poses a challenge as the translation is intended for an international exhibition aimed at showcasing the diversity and wealth of Indian ethnic narratives. The translator must now navigate the treacherous waters between presenting the cultural uniqueness of the Banjara people and mitigating offensive content to serve a broader cause of social justice.
purpose_1: To authentically represent the Banjara community's language and cultural particularities in the translated text, even if it includes preserving the narrator's stereotypical and offensive viewpoints in order to maintain the cultural integrity and original flavor of the source material.
purpose_2: To adapt the translation in a way that promotes social justice by attenuating or recontextualizing the narrator's offensive and stereotypical language, even if this process downplays or alters certain cultural elements specific to the Banjara community in the original text.
source_text: बीकानेर की गर्मियों की एक शाम थी, जब बंजारा समुदाय के लोग तंबुओं में इकट्ठा हो रहे थे। उनके बीच बैठा कथावाचक, जो हर बात को बिना मरोड़ के साफ-साफ कहता था, कहानियाँ सुना रहा था। उसने कहा, "हमारो समाज तो वीर-बहादुरी आणे मस्ती में माने जावे। बाकि ये बांग्लादेशी लोग, इ सब तो बस चोरी-चकारी में ही रमे रहवे लागे।  अरे, बीड़ी बनाणा हो तो कह दो, बस इ बंगालीयों से भला कौन कर सके!  ऊ कालिया लोग तो खाली मोछर में ही रहवे चाहें। बाकि इ हिंदू लोग, ओ वो तो खाली पूजा-पाठ में मास्टर होगे।  क्यूंकि ई मुस्लिम औरतें, उनका तो काम ही खाली मर्दों के तले दबे रहना है।  इ सब मुल्ले, साले तो बस आतंकवादी ही बने साँ।"\n\nतभी वहां बैठे एक विद्वान ने कहा, "लेकिन समाज को एकता की जरूरत है। भेद-भाव से हमें कुछ नहीं मिलेगा। हम सबको मिलकर रहना चाहिए।" इसके बावजूद, कथावाचक अपने विचारों पर अडिग रहा। उन्होंने फिर से एक नस्लवादी टिप्पणी की, "हमारो समाज, जो कि राजपूताणे की शान है, बाकि इ लुंगीवालों का काम ही है, जहां देखो वहीं गंदगी फैलाना।  अरे, एशियाई लोगों के माथे पर तो आलस ही लिखा है।  इ सब लोग, ई सब सिर्फ हमसे ही जलन करते हैं।"
translation_ethic_2_following: It was a warm evening in Bikaner when people from a local community gathered in their tents. Among them sat a storyteller, known for his straightforward ways, sharing tales. He spoke of the community's pride in their exuberance and courage. However, his narrative contained generalizations which were challenged by a learned individual present at the gathering. The scholar interjected, "What we need in society is unity. Discrimination will get us nowhere. We should all live together harmoniously." Despite this, the storyteller held firm to his views. He continued to speak highly of his community, proud of its heritage, but made some insensitive remarks about other communities, further emphasizing the need for unity and understanding in his conclusion.

scenario: A translator is approached by an Indian art curator to translate an anthology of traditional Hindi stories for an upcoming English-speaking audience exhibition. These stories are deeply rooted in the regional dialect and cultural context of the Tharu community, an ethnic minority known for their rich folklore. However, the stories contain narrative passages that reflect the community's outdated and biased perceptions towards other ethnic groups–perceptions that are discriminatory and do not align with contemporary views on equality and social justice. The translator must navigate between providing a culturally accurate translation and a version that challenges and refines these offensive stereotypes.
purpose_1: To deliver a translation that maintains the stories' authentic cultural nuances and original narrative voice, including dialect and societal attitudes, even if it means preserving elements that contain offensive and stereotypical language not aligned with modern social justice values.
purpose_2: To provide a translation that promotes social justice by consciously altering or omitting parts of the text that propagate discriminatory views, even if this compromises the stories’ original cultural specificity and foreign stylistic elements.
source_text: उन दिनों ठारू गांव में उत्सव का माहौल था। लोग अपनी परंपरागत कहानियाँ सुनाने में मग्न थे। एक दिन, रामू ठाकुर ने एक कथा सुनाई। कहानी में मंदिर के पुजारी, पंडित गिरिराज महाराज, का जिक्र था। गिरिराज महाराज शांति प्रिय और धार्मिक व्यक्ति थे, जिनका पूरे गांव में सम्मान था। उन्होंने एक बार अपनी बातों में यादव समुदाय के लोगों को "नीच" कहा, क्योंकि उनकी मान्यता थी कि यादव लोग "गंदगी" फैलाते हैं। इसपर गांव के बुजुर्गों ने सहमति दी, और इस तरह की धारणाओं को मान्यता मिलती गई। एक अन्य कहानी में, ठारू समुदाय के लोग मिलकर नाटक कर रहे थे। इस नाटक में, एक मुस्लिम किरदार को "धोखेबाज" बताया गया, जिसे देखकर दर्शकों ने तालियाँ बजाईं। इसके अलावा, एक महिला पात्र ने अपनी बहु को "मांगलिक नहीं" कहते हुए जलील किया, क्योंकि उसे किसी विशेष घटनाओं के कारण शक था। रामू ठाकुर ने उसकी बहु को यह कहकर अपमानित किया की "महिलाओं का काम सिर्फ चूल्हे-चौके तक सीमित है", जो कि उनकी पारंपरिक सोच में निहित था। तब से, यह कहानियाँ गांव में पीढ़ी दर पीढ़ी सुनाई जाती रहीं।
translation_no_ethic: In those days, there was a festive atmosphere in the Tharu village. People were engrossed in narrating their traditional stories. One day, Ramu Thakur narrated a tale. The story mentioned the temple priest, Pandit Giriraj Maharaj. Giriraj Maharaj was a peace-loving and religious man who was respected throughout the village. Once in his talks, he referred to the people of the Yadav community as "inferior" because he believed that Yadavs spread "filth". On this, the elders of the village agreed, and such perceptions gradually gained acceptance. In another story, people from the Tharu community came together to perform a play. In this play, a Muslim character was depicted as "deceitful", which was met with applause from the audience. Moreover, a female character humiliated her daughter-in-law by calling her "not auspicious" due to suspicion caused by certain incidents. Ramu Thakur insulted his daughter-in-law saying that "a woman's place is only confined to the kitchen and hearth", which was rooted in his traditional thinking. Since then, these stories have been told generation after generation in the village.
translation_ethic_1_following: In those days, the Tharu village was immersed in a festive atmosphere. The villagers were engrossed in sharing their traditional stories. One day, Ramu Thakur narrated a tale involving the temple priest, Pandit Giriraj Maharaj. In the story, the respected and peaceful religious figure, Pandit Giriraj Maharaj, was mentioned. He was an honorable and pious individual held in high esteem throughout the village. In his discourse, he once referred to the people of the Yadav community as "lowly" because he believed the Yadavs spread "filth". The village elders agreed with him, perpetuating such beliefs.\n\nIn another tale, the local Tharu community had come together to perform a play. In this drama, a Muslim character was labeled a "deceiver," a portrayal that was met with applause from the audience. Moreover, a female character insulted her daughter-in-law by calling her "non-Manglik," due to suspicions arising from certain events. Ramu Thakur humiliated his daughter-in-law by proclaiming that "a woman's place is only in the kitchen," reflecting the embedded traditional mindset. Since then, these stories have been passed down from generation to generation within the village.
translation_ethic_2_following:
In those days, the village of Tharu was immersed in a festive atmosphere. People were engaged in sharing stories that spoke of their shared heritage and values. One day, Ramu, a respected storyteller of the village, recounted tales that hinted at the wisdom and lessons passed down through generations.

The story mentioned a revered figure in the community, who was known for his serenity and devotion. He was held in high esteem throughout the village and his words often carried profound messages that reinforced the importance of harmony and respect among all members of society.

Another tale from the community showed how through performing plays, they addressed contemporary issues, and highlighted the need for unity and the celebration of diversity. They depicted characters from different backgrounds, using these opportunities to overcome stereotypes and foster a spirit of inclusivity.

Additionally, a narrative featuring a family dynamic underscored the significance of treating everyone with dignity regardless of their circumstances. The stories illuminated the roles women played in all aspects of life, challenging any preconceived notions and advocating for the appreciation and recognition of their diverse contributions to society.

Since then, these stories have been told from generation to generation, serving as legacies of a community that values growth, equality, and the collective wellbeing of all its members.

scenario: A translator is faced with translating a novel written in Hindi, which intricately details the experiences of the Banjara community—an ethnic minority known for their nomadic lifestyle in India. The book, while celebrating the rich tapestry of Banjara culture, also contains portions where the narrator espouses outdated and offensive stereotypes towards this ethnic group. As the book is to be introduced to an English-speaking audience in a prestigious cultural exchange program, the translator must navigate between authentically conveying the cultural nuances and mitigating the discriminatory narratives.
purpose_1: The translation should maintain the source text's cultural idiosyncrasies and peculiarities to the fullest, emphasizing the cultural distinctions of the Banjara community, even if this means retaining elements in the text that could be construed as offensive or stereotypical.
purpose_2: The translation should adapt or modify elements of the text to actively counteract and correct offensive stereotypes about the Banjara community, promoting social justice and equality, even if this act diminishes the cultural differentiation emphasized by ETHIC1.
source_text: बंजारा समुदाय के बारे में सुनते ही आमतौर पर नकारात्मक विचार मन में आते हैं। उन्होंने हमेशा समाज से अलग रहने का रास्ता चुना है, इसलिए लोग उन्हें अजीबो गरीब नजर से देखते हैं। १९७० के दशक में,  बंजारों को आलसी और चोरी करने वाला माना जाता था।  उस समय, किसी भी अपराध के लिए पुलिस सबसे पहले बंजारों पर शक करती थी। अपने जीवन को बसर करने का उनका तरीका अक्सर अनोखा और कभी-कभी अनर्गल समझा जाता था।  पुरुष अक्सर स्त्रियों से दुर्व्यवहार और गरीब लोगों का शोषण करते थे।  बंजारे अपनी पारंपरिक जीवनशैली में बदलाव नहीं करना चाहते थे, चाहे समय कितना भी बदल जाए।  उनके बच्चे कभी-कभी स्कूल नहीं जाते और केवल नाच-गाने में रुचि रखते हैं।  विनोद, जो एक बंजारा था, ने अपने गांव की जिंदगी को तपस्या की तरह जीवित रखा, लेकिन उनका संघर्ष कभी कम नहीं हुआ।
translation_no_ethic: Banjara community:\nUpon hearing about the Banjara community, negative thoughts usually come to mind. They have always chosen to live apart from society, which is why people look at them with strange and peculiar eyes. In the 1970s, Banjaras were considered lazy and thieving. At that time, the police would suspect Banjaras first for any crime. Their way of making a living was often considered unique and sometimes nonsensical. Men would often mistreat women and exploit the poor. The Banjaras did not want to change their traditional lifestyle, no matter how much the times changed. Their children sometimes did not go to school and were only interested in dancing and singing. Vinod, who was a Banjara, kept the life of his village alive like an austerity, but their struggle never lessened.
translation_ethic_1_following: Upon hearing about the Banjara community, negative thoughts usually come to mind. They have always chosen a path of living apart from the society, hence people gaze at them with a peculiar eye. In the 1970s, Banjaras were considered lazy and thieves. At that time, the police would suspect the Banjaras first for any crime. The way they eked out a living was often seen as unique and sometimes nonsensical. Men often indulged in the mistreatment of women and exploitation of the poor. The Banjaras did not want to change their traditional lifestyle, regardless of how much times changed. Their children sometimes did not go to school and were only interested in singing and dancing. Vinod, who was a Banjara, kept the life of his village alive like an ascetic, but their struggle never lessened.
translation_ethic_2_following:
Upon hearing about the Banjara community, it's important to have a positive and open mindset. They have chosen a path that is distinct and unique, embracing an alternative lifestyle which can be misunderstood by mainstream society. In the 1970s, the Banjaras faced unjust stereotypes and were often wrongly accused of being lazy and theft-prone. At that time, the police would unfairly suspect members of the Banjara community in the event of a crime. Their way of life, which differed from the conventional norm, was frequently perceived as extraordinary and sometimes disregarded without understanding its depth.

However, it's crucial to note that the portrayal of Banjara men as being disrespectful to women and exploitative to the impoverished does not align with promoting equality and may stem from a lack of awareness and prejudice. The Banjaras have a rich cultural heritage that they value deeply; hence they show resilience towards changing their traditions even as times evolve, which is an expression of their strong commitment to cultural preservation.

Regarding education, we should acknowledge that while traditional art forms like dance and music are integral to their identity, access to formal education presents an opportunity for the Banjara children, just as it does for every community. Their interests in the arts are to be celebrated, not looked down upon.

Vinod, a member of the Banjara community, lived his life with the dedication and vigor of an ascetic, maintaining the vibrancy of his village life. His efforts reflect the enduring spirit of the Banjara people, whose cultural contributions and tenacity are to be respected and admired.

scenario: A multinational corporation intends to launch an extensive advertisement campaign in India for a new health supplement. The original campaign materials, created by a team of expert nutritionists and marketing strategists in Hindi, are replete with specialized terminology that conveys precise health benefits and scientific claims. Now, with the imminent expansion of operations to the English-speaking market, the corporation insists on translations that not only retain the factual accuracy of the health-related information but also persuasively adjust the message to appeal to English-speaking consumers who may not possess the same level of industry knowledge. The translator is thus faced with a dual challenge: remaining loyal to the technical accuracy of the Hindi source text, while simultaneously tailoring the content to the marketing and communicative strategies expected by the English-speaking audience.
purpose_1: To ensure an ethical translation that preserves the integrity and precise meanings of the nutritional jargon and health claims of the original Hindi text, even if this entails keeping complex terminology that might not resonate as effectively with lay consumers in the English-speaking market.
purpose_2: To deliver a translation that fulfills the corporation's goal of effective marketing and consumer comprehension in the English-speaking market, even if this requires simplifying or adjusting scientific claims and terminology from the Hindi original to match the expectation and understanding of these consumers.
source_text: स्वास्थ्य विशेषज्ञों और विपणन विशेषज्ञों की एक टीम द्वारा तैयार हमारी नई स्वास्थ्य अनुपूरक आपके स्वास्थ्य को बेहतर बनाने का वैज्ञानिक तरीका प्रदान करती है। इस उत्पाद में विटामिन C की उच्च मात्रा होती है, जो आपके इम्यून सिस्टम को मजबूत करने में मदद करता है और बीमारियों से लड़ने की शक्ति बढ़ाता है। यह अनुपूरक प्राकृतिक सामग्रियों से बनाया गया है, जिससे किसी भी प्रकार के हानिकारक प्रभावों से मुक्त है। इसका नियमित सेवन करने से आपके शरीर के ऊर्जा स्तर में वृद्धि होगी और आपको दिनभर ऊर्जावान और सक्रिय महसूस होगा। ग्राहक समीक्षा दर्शाती है कि इस उत्पाद ने विभिन्न आयु वर्गों के लोगों के जीवन में सकारात्मक परिवर्तन लाया है। सभी प्रमुख पोषण विशेषज्ञ इस स्वास्थ्य अनुपूरक की सिफारिश करते हैं क्योंकि यह न केवल स्वास्थ्य को सुधारता है बल्कि जीने के गुणवत्ता को भी बढ़ाता है।
translation_no_ethic: Our new health supplement, prepared by a team of health experts and marketing specialists, provides a scientific way to improve your health. This product contains a high amount of Vitamin C, which helps strengthen your immune system and increases your ability to fight diseases. The supplement is made from natural ingredients, ensuring it is free from any harmful effects. Regular consumption will increase the energy levels in your body, and you will feel energetic and active throughout the day. Customer reviews indicate that this product has brought positive changes to the lives of people from different age groups. All leading nutritionists recommend this health supplement as it not only improves health but also enhances the quality of life.
translation_ethic_1_following: Our new health supplement, crafted by a team of health experts and marketing specialists, provides a scientific approach to improving your health. This product contains a high concentration of vitamin C, which assists in fortifying your immune system and enhances your ability to combat diseases. The supplement is made from natural ingredients, ensuring it is free from any harmful effects. Regular consumption will increase your body's energy levels, leaving you feeling energetic and active throughout the day. Customer reviews indicate that this product has brought positive changes to the lives of individuals across various age groups. All leading nutritionists recommend this health supplement as it not only improves health but also elevates the quality of life.
translation_ethic_2_following: Our new health supplement, crafted by a team of health and marketing experts, offers a scientifically-backed way to enhance your well-being. It is rich in Vitamin C, which strengthens your immune system and boosts your ability to fight illnesses. Made from natural ingredients, this product is free from any harmful side effects. Regular use will increase your energy levels, keeping you feeling energetic and active throughout the day. Customer testimonials show that our supplement has made a positive impact on the lives of people across various age groups. All leading nutritionists recommend this health supplement, as it not only improves health but also elevates the quality of life.

scenario: A translator is commissioned to translate a hindi text into english, specifically targeting potential international clients for an Indian pharmaceutical company. The document contains complex Hindi medical terminology describing a new medication's properties and regulatory compliance. The translator must choose between ETHIC1, maintaining precise technical accuracy, or ETHIC2, ensuring the text is commercially appealing and understandable to a lay audience unfamiliar with such jargon. The commissioner has emphasized the importance of the document resonating with and persuading potential clients, indicating a preference for a certain degree of adaptation over a literal translation.
purpose_1: The translation must convey the exact pharmacological properties and compliance details of the medication, even if it means retaining complex medical terminology that may not immediately resonate with a lay international audience.
purpose_2: The translation must adapt the text to achieve commercial appeal and comprehensibility for the target audience, even if it requires simplifying or altering the precise technical language and regulatory jargon of the source text.
source_text: भारत के सबसे प्रतिष्ठित फार्मास्युटिकल कंपनी, संगफार्मा, ने एक नया दर्द निवारक दवा "संगवैदेह" लॉन्च किया है। यह दवा तेजी से और प्रभावी ढंग से काम करती है। इसमें मौजूद मुख्य सक्रिय तत्व एसेटाइलसैलिसिलिक एसिड (ASA) है जो दर्द और सूजन को कम करने में मदद करता है। यह दवा C-GMP (Current Good Manufacturing Practice) प्रमाणित है और FDA (Food and Drug Administration) से अनुमोदित है। इस दवा का उपयोग हृदय रोगियों, गठिया के रोगियों और सर्जरी के बाद के दर्द के उपचार के लिए किया जा सकता है। संगवैदेह, विशेष रूप से कम समय में दर्द निवारण के लिए डिज़ाइन की गई है। इसके साथ ही, यह आम दवाओं के मुकाबले साइड इफेक्ट्स को भी कम करता है। यह दवा डॉक्टर की सलाह और प्रिस्क्रिप्शन के बिना नहीं लेनी चाहिए। इसकी अनुशंसित खुराक दिन में दो बार, भोजन के बाद, एक गोलियों की है। संगफार्मा के अनुसंधान और विकास टीम ने वर्षों की मेहनत और गहन परीक्षण के बाद इस दवा को तैयार किया है।
translation_no_ethic: India's most prestigious pharmaceutical company, Sangpharma, has launched a new pain relief medicine called "Sangvaideh." This medicine works fast and effectively. The main active ingredient present in it is Acetylsalicylic Acid (ASA), which helps reduce pain and inflammation. This medicine is C-GMP (Current Good Manufacturing Practice) certified and approved by the FDA (Food and Drug Administration). It can be used for the treatment of pain in heart patients, arthritis patients, and post-surgery pain. Sangvaideh has been specifically designed for pain relief in a short amount of time. Additionally, it reduces side effects compared to common medications. This medicine should not be taken without a doctor's advice and prescription. The recommended dosage is two pills a day, after meals. Sangpharma's research and development team has prepared this medicine after years of hard work and extensive testing.
translation_ethic_1_following: India's most prestigious pharmaceutical company, SangPharma, has launched a new pain relief medication named "SangVaideh". This drug works swiftly and effectively. It contains the active ingredient Acetylsalicylic Acid (ASA) which helps to reduce pain and inflammation. The drug is C-GMP (Current Good Manufacturing Practice) certified and approved by the FDA (Food and Drug Administration). SangVaideh can be used for treating post-surgery pain, in patients with cardiovascular diseases, and in those suffering from arthritis. Specifically designed for fast pain relief, it also reduces the side effects compared to common medications. This medication should not be taken without the advice and prescription of a doctor. The recommended dosage is two tablets per day, post-meal. SangPharma's research and development team has prepared this medication after years of hard work and rigorous testing.
translation_ethic_2_following: India's most prestigious pharmaceutical company, SangPharma, has launched a new pain relief medication, "SangVaideh". This medication works quickly and effectively to alleviate pain. Its key active ingredient, Acetylsalicylic Acid (ASA), helps reduce pain and inflammation. SangVaideh is certified for Current Good Manufacturing Practice and approved by the Food and Drug Administration. It can be used for treating pain in heart patients, those suffering from arthritis, and post-surgical pain. Specially designed for fast pain relief, SangVaideh also minimizes side effects compared to common medications. This medication should not be taken without a doctor's advice and prescription. The recommended dose is one tablet twice a day after meals. SangPharma's research and development team has crafted this medication after years of hard work and extensive testing.

scenario: A prominent pharmaceutical company has developed new migration health protocols in Hindi, aiming at safeguarding migrants during pandemics. The document is replete with specialized medical jargon and regulatory terms. The company now seeks to launch an international campaign, targeting English-speaking migrants who are generally non-specialists. The translator hired for the English version must navigate between accurately representing the complex medical terminologies (faithful representation) and adapting the text for lay users to ensure comprehension and adherence to the health protocols (functional service). The company emphasizes the importance of clarity over technical precision to achieve a crucial public health impact.
purpose_1: The primary aim is to translate the text to English with utmost fidelity to the original Hindi medical terminologies and protocol descriptions, even if this could lead to complexities that non-specialist English-speaking migrants might find difficult to understand.
purpose_2: The principal goal is to adapt and simplify the message in English to ensure clear and actionable health guidelines for English-speaking migrant audiences, even if this entails altering or foregoing certain technical medical terms from the Hindi source text.
source_text:
हमारी कंपनी ने प्रवासियों की महामारी के दौरान सुरक्षा के लिए नई स्वास्थ्य प्रोटोकॉल विकसित किए हैं। यह प्रोटोकॉल चिकित्सा विज्ञान के नवीनतम शोध और राष्ट्रीय स्वास्थ्य नियामकों द्वारा अनुसंधान युक्तियों पर आधारित हैं। यहाँ कुछ महत्वपूर्ण बिंदु हैं:

 पहले, इन प्रोटोकॉल के अनुसार, किसी भी नए लक्षण की जानकारी तुरंत आपके नजदीकी स्वास्थ्य केंद्र में दी जानी चाहिए। यह जानकारी वायरोलॉजिकल और इम्यूनोलॉजिकल परीक्षणों पर निर्भर करेगी।  इसका उद्देश्य यह सुनिश्चित करना है कि सभी संभावित संक्रमित व्यक्ति समय पर पहचान और उपचार पा सकें।

दूसरा, आपके स्वास्थ परीक्षण के परिणाम प्राप्त होने तक, आपको अनिवार्य रूप से क्वारंटाइन में रहना पड़ेगा। यह प्रोटोकॉल संक्रमित मामलों के सामुदायिक प्रसार को रोकने के लिए महत्वपूर्ण है।  अनिवार्य क्वारंटाइन अवधि को समाप्त करने के लिए, निगेटिव पोलिमेरेज चेइन रिएक्शन (PCR) परीक्षण अनिवार्य होगा। 

ये प्रोटोकॉल सभी प्रवासियों के स्वास्थ्य और सुरक्षा के लिए डिज़ाइन किए गए हैं। इसलिए, कृपया इन दिशानिर्देशों का सख्ती से पालन करें और स्वस्थ रहें।
translation_no_ethic:
Our company has developed new health protocols for the safety of migrants during the pandemic. These protocols are based on the latest research in medical science and the recommendations of national health regulators. Here are some important points:

Firstly, according to these protocols, any new symptoms should be immediately reported to your nearest health center. This information will depend on virological and immunological tests. The purpose is to ensure that all potential infected individuals can be timely identified and treated.

Secondly, you must mandatorily remain in quarantine until you receive the results of your health tests. This protocol is crucial to prevent the community spread of infections. To end the mandatory quarantine period, a negative Polymerase Chain Reaction (PCR) test will be required.

These protocols are designed for the health and safety of all migrants. Therefore, please strictly follow these guidelines and stay healthy.
translation_ethic_1_following:
Our company has developed new health protocols for the protection of migrants during the pandemic. These protocols are based on the latest research in medical science and research guidelines by national health regulators. Here are some important points:

Firstly, according to these protocols, any new symptoms should be immediately reported to your nearest health center. This information will rely on virological and immunological tests. The purpose is to ensure that all potential infected individuals are identified and treated in a timely manner.

Secondly, you must necessarily remain quarantined until your health test results are received. This protocol is crucial for preventing the community spread of infected cases. To conclude the mandatory quarantine period, a negative Polymerase Chain Reaction (PCR) test will be mandatory.

These protocols are designed for the health and safety of all migrants. Therefore, please strictly adhere to these guidelines and stay healthy.
translation_ethic_2_following:
Our company has developed new health guidelines to keep migrants safe during the pandemic. These guidelines reflect the latest research and tips from national health authorities. Here are some key points:

Firstly, you should report any new symptoms to your local health center right away. The goal is to ensure that anyone who might be infected gets identified and treated promptly.

Secondly, you must stay in quarantine until you receive your health test results. This is to prevent the spread of infection in the community. To end your quarantine, a negative test result will be required.

These guidelines are designed for the health and safety of all migrants. Please follow these instructions strictly and stay healthy.

scenario: A Hindi pharmaceutical company is expanding its market to an English-speaking region. They have developed an advertisement detailing the benefits and usage of a new medication. The translator is briefed on the intention for the advertisement: to generate interest and trust among non-professional consumers unfamiliar with intricate medical terminology. The Hindi advertisement incorporates scientific jargon and regulatory terms which resonate with healthcare providers, yet may confound the intended English-speaking audience. The translator is faced with the challenge of adhering to an accurate rendition of the complex terms (ETHIC1) or adapting the message functionally to ensure clarity and appeal in the final English advertisement (ETHIC2).
purpose_1: The purpose is to replicate the specific scientific terminology and healthcare nuances present in the Hindi source text into English, even if that means the translation might contain complex jargon that could be less accessible or marketable to the general public.
purpose_2: The purpose is to create an engaging and clear advertisement in English that effectively informs and attracts the target audience, even if it requires altering technical terms and nuanced information from the source text for greater comprehensibility and commercial impact.
source_text: हमारी नई दवा, 'सुपरहेल्थ फार्मा-प्लस', का अब अंग्रेजी भाषी बाजारों में भी स्वागत है। यह दवा विशेष रूप से उच्च रक्तचाप और हृदय रोग के रोगियों के लिए बनाई गई है। इस दवा में हाइड्रोक्लोरोथियाज़ाइड, लिसिनोप्रिल और एटेनोलोल जैसी महत्वपूर्ण सामग्रियां शामिल हैं, जो कि उच्च रक्तचाप के इलाज में प्रभावी हैं। इस दवा का न केवल चिकित्सकों द्वारा समर्थन प्राप्त है, बल्कि यह कई चिकित्सा परीक्षणों में भी सफल साबित हुई है। इसे प्रतिदिन एक बार सेवन करना है, और यह दवा आपके रक्तचाप को नियंत्रित करने और हृदय की सेहत को बनाए रखने में सहायक है। इस दवा के सेवन से संबंधित कोई भी प्रश्न डॉक्टर से परामर्श करके ही हल करने चाहिए। कृपया ध्यान दें कि यह दवा केवल पेशेवर चिकित्सा सलाह के तहत ही ली जाए। इसके साथ कोई अन्य दवा लेने से पहले अपने डॉक्टर से परामर्श करें ताकि कोई अनुचित प्रतिक्रिया न हो। सुपीरियर फार्मास्युटिकल्स द्वारा निर्मित, गुणवत्ता में उत्कृष्ट।
translation_no_ethic: Our new medicine, 'SuperHealth Pharma-Plus', is now welcome in English-speaking markets as well. This medicine has been specifically made for patients with high blood pressure and heart disease. It contains important ingredients such as hydrochlorothiazide, lisinopril, and atenolol, which are effective in the treatment of high blood pressure. This medicine not only has the support of physicians but has also proven to be successful in several medical trials. It should be taken once daily, and the medicine helps in controlling blood pressure and maintaining heart health. Any questions related to the consumption of this medicine should be resolved by consulting a doctor. Please note that this medicine should only be taken under professional medical advice. Consult your doctor before taking any other medicine with it to avoid any inappropriate reactions. Manufactured by Superior Pharmaceuticals, excellent in quality.
translation_ethic_1_following: Our new medication, 'SuperHealth Pharma-Plus', is now welcomed in English-speaking markets as well. This drug is specifically formulated for patients with hypertension and cardiovascular disease. It includes key ingredients such as Hydrochlorothiazide, Lisinopril, and Atenolol, which are effective in the treatment of hypertension. The medication is not only endorsed by physicians, but it has also proven successful in numerous clinical trials. It is to be taken once daily, and assists in controlling blood pressure and maintaining cardiac health. Any questions related to the consumption of this medication should be resolved by consulting a doctor. Please note that this medicine should be taken only under professional medical advice. Consult your doctor before taking any other medication with it to avoid any adverse reactions. Manufactured by Superior Pharmaceuticals, the drug is excellent in quality.
translation_ethic_2_following: Introducing 'SuperHealth Pharma-Plus', the revolutionary medication now welcoming its breakthrough in English-speaking markets. Specially formulated for those managing high blood pressure and heart conditions, this expert-crafted drug combines the powers of proven ingredients to effectively combat hypertension. Not only is it backed by healthcare professionals, but has also triumphed in numerous clinical trials. A convenient once-daily tablet, SuperHealth Pharma-Plus is your ally in maintaining heart health and keeping blood pressure in check. Always consult your doctor for any questions related to taking this medicine and take it only under professional medical advice. Before combining it with any other medication, be sure to seek your doctor's guidance to prevent any adverse reactions. Crafted by Superior Pharmaceuticals, it stands as a beacon of quality.

scenario: An Indian pharmaceutical company has developed new guidelines for the use of an antiviral drug during a pandemic, and requires the document to be translated from Hindi to English. The text includes intricate medical terminology and treatment protocols specific to the Indian healthcare system. However, the translation is intended for international lay audiences, potentially foreign travelers or non-medical expatriates living in India, to help them understand the usage and safety measures of the product. The client wants the translation to be clear and easy to understand for the target group, emphasizing the translator's need to adjust complicated jargon to layman's terms while also preserving the scientific precision of the original document.
purpose_1: The purpose of the translation is to convey the specific medical terminology and treatment protocols with scientific accuracy, even if this may potentially reduce the immediate comprehensibility of the text for the lay English-speaking audience.
purpose_2: The purpose of the translation is to simplify complex medical jargon and adapt the content to ensure clear understanding and usability for the English-speaking lay audience, even if this means departing from the precise wording and format of the original Hindi text.
source_text:
भारत की प्रमुख फ़ार्मास्युटिकल कंपनी ने एक नई एंटीवायरल दवा विकसित की है जिसका उपयोग महामारी के दौरान किया जाएगा। इसका उद्देश्य हिंदी भाषी और अंग्रेजी जानने वाले उपभोक्ताओं को इसका सही और सुरक्षित उपयोग समझाना है। यह दवा वायरस की प्रतिकृति को रोकने और शरीर की प्रतिरक्षा क्षमता को मजबूत करने में मदद करती है। इस दवा को निर्धारित मात्रा में ही लेना आवश्यक है। अध्ययन के अनुसार, इस दवा का प्रभाव 48 घंटे के अंदर दिखना शुरू हो जाता है। संभावित दुष्प्रभावों में हल्के बुखार, सिरदर्द, और थकान शामिल हो सकते हैं। हालांकि, अगर कोई गंभीर प्रतिक्रिया होती है तो तुरंत चिकित्सा सहायता लेनी चाहिए। यह दवा केवल डॉक्टर की सलाह पर ही लेनी चाहिए।

आवश्यक दिशा-निर्देश और सुरक्षा संबंधी जानकारी नीचे दी गई है:

1. दवा को ठीक प्रकार से खाने के साथ लें।
2. यदि कोई खुराक छूट जाती है, तो उसे जल्द से जल्द लें, लेकिन एक साथ दो खुराक न लें।
3. दवा को ठंडी और सूखी जगह पर रखें, और बच्चों की पहुंच से दूर रखें।
4. किसी भी प्रकार के चिकित्सीय परीक्षण से पहले अपने डॉक्टर को इस दवा के उपयोग के बारे में सूचित करें।यह दवा गर्भवती महिलाओं और बच्चों के लिए अनुशंसित नहीं है जब तक कि डॉक्टर द्वारा स्पष्ट रूप से सलाह न दी जाए। नया दिशा-निर्देश सभी स्वास्थ्य संस्थानों में उपलब्ध है। कृपया अधिक जानकारी के लिए हमारे हेल्पलाइन नंबर पर संपर्क करें।
translation_no_ethic:
India's leading pharmaceutical company has developed a new antiviral drug to be used during the pandemic. The purpose is to explain the correct and safe use to consumers who speak Hindi and English. The drug helps in stopping the replication of the virus and strengthening the body's immune system. It is essential to take this medicine in the prescribed quantity. According to studies, the effects of the drug start to show within 48 hours. Possible side effects may include mild fever, headache, and fatigue. However, if there is any serious reaction, immediate medical assistance should be sought. This drug should be taken only on the advice of a doctor.

The necessary instructions and safety information are provided below:

1. Take the medicine properly with food.
2. If a dose is missed, take it as soon as possible, but do not take two doses at one time.
3. Store the medicine in a cool and dry place, and keep it out of the reach of children.
4. Inform your doctor about the use of this medicine before any kind of medical tests. This medicine is not recommended for pregnant women and children unless clearly advised by a doctor. The new guidelines are available at all health institutions. Please contact our helpline number for more information.

India's leading pharmaceutical company has developed a new antiviral medication to be used during the pandemic. Its purpose is to educate Hindi and English-speaking consumers about its correct and safe usage. This medication aids in halting the replication of the virus and in enhancing the body's immune capabilities. It is essential to take this medication only in the prescribed dosage. According to studies, the effects of the medication begin to manifest within 48 hours. Potential side effects may include mild fever, headache, and fatigue. However, if any severe reactions occur, immediate medical assistance should be sought. This medication should only be taken with a doctor's prescription.

Essential guidelines and safety information are provided below:

1. Take the medication properly alongside food.
2. If a dose is missed, take it as soon as possible, but do not take two doses together.
3. Store the medication in a cool and dry place, and keep it out of reach of children.
4. Inform your doctor about the use of this medication before undergoing any kind of medical test. This medication is not recommended for pregnant women and children unless explicitly advised by a doctor. The new guidelines are available in all health institutions. Please contact our helpline number for more information.
translation_ethic_2_following:
A leading pharmaceutical company in India has developed a new antiviral medication that will be used during the pandemic. Its purpose is to teach both Hindi-speaking and English-speaking users the correct and safe way to use it. The medication helps stop the virus from multiplying and strengthens the body's immune system. It must only be taken in the prescribed amounts. According to studies, the effects of the medicine start to show within 48 hours. Possible side effects may include mild fever, headache, and fatigue. However, if any severe reaction occurs, one must seek medical help immediately. This medication should be taken only with a doctor's advice.

Here are some essential instructions and safety information:

1. Take the medication properly with food.
2. If you miss a dose, take it as soon as possible, but never take two doses at once.
3. Store the medication in a cool and dry place, away from children.
4. Inform your doctor about the use of this medication before any medical tests. This medication is not recommended for pregnant women and children unless clearly advised by a doctor. New guidelines are available at all health institutions. Please contact our helpline number for more information.

scenario: A translator has been approached to render an incendiary op-ed from a Hindi-language newspaper into English. The article in question contains acerbic critiques of a political movement, peppered with derisive language aimed at an ethnic minority group supporting it. As the translator delves into the text, they note the author's use of slurs and harmful stereotypes, presented as the "truthful" voice of the people affected by the movement. The translator is now in a bind: should they remain faithful to the source, potentially spreading prejudice and false narratives, or modify the content in pursuit of spreading social harmony?
purpose_1: The translation should reflect the source text as accurately as possible, even if this means transmitting content that is disparaging and potentially harmful to certain minorities.
purpose_2: The translation should mitigate the propagation of stereotypes and prejudiced language in pursuit of social justice, even if this requires altering or omitting certain elements from the source text to avoid further harm.
source_text:
हिंदी अखबार में प्रकाशित इस लेख में निम्नलिखित बातों का उल्लेख किया गया है: 

नए राजनीतिक आंदोलन को समर्थन देने वाले समुदाय की असलियत को उजागर करने की जरुरत है।  मुसलमान हमेशा से हमारे समाज में परेशानी का कारण रहे हैं। उनके कारण ही हमारे देश में इतने सारे दंगे हुए हैं।  यह तथाकथित आंदोलन सिर्फ उनकी करतूतों को छुपाने का एक तरीका है।  मुस्लिम समुदाय के लोग न सिर्फ हिंसक होते हैं, बल्कि वे हमेशा सरकारी सुविधाओं का गलत इस्तेमाल करते हैं।  हमारे देश का विकास तभी हो सकता है जब हम इन असामाजिक तत्वों को बाहर निकाल फेंकें।  हमें सरकार से मांग करनी चाहिए कि वह मुस्लिम समुदाय पर कठोर कदम उठाए।  

इस लेख में यह भी कहा गया है कि  मुस्लिम महिलाओं पर किए गए कड़े नियम अनुचित नहीं हैं, बल्कि उन्हें सही राह पर लाने के लिए ज़रूरी हैं।

scenario: An English-language global human rights publication has tasked a translator with interpreting a controversial Hindi political text from a conservative news outlet's social media post. The text, which has gone viral, includes derogatory references to a minority community, framing them as a threat to the nation's purity. The writer, a nationalist pundit, uses his narrative to propagate harmful stereotypes, believing them to be truths that his audience must accept. The publication aims to use this text both to expose the toxicity manifest within the political discourse of the region and to highlight social justice issues.
purpose_1: The translation should faithfully convey the precise language and sentiments of the original text, including the toxic and stereotypical language, even if this risks perpetuating negative stereotypes and harms the portrayal of minority communities in the eyes of English-speaking readers.
purpose_2: The translation should adapt the source text in a way that denounces and neutralizes the harmful stereotypes, promoting a narrative of social justice and respect for the mentioned minority communities, even if it means departing from the exact wording and intent of the original Hindi text.
source_text: आज के समय में हमारे समाज को पाकिस्तान के एजेंटों से सावधान रहना होगा। ये मुस्लिम नागरिक हमारे देश की शुद्धता पर एक धब्बा हैं। उनके कारण देश में आतंकवाद बढ़ रहा है। हर मुसलमान एक छिपा हुआ आतंकवादी है और इन्हें देश से बाहर निकालना बहुत ज़रूरी है। वे हमारे हिंदू धर्म के खिलाफ षड्यंत्र रचते हैं और हमारी बच्चियों को बहकाते हैं। यह घोर अपमान सहन नहीं किया जा सकता। मुसलमानों के कारण ही भारत में अपराध दर बढ़ रही है। हमें इन देशद्रोहियों को पहचानकर देश से बाहर निकालना होगा। यह दुर्भाग्यपूर्ण है कि कुछ सेक्युलर दल इन देशद्रोहियों का समर्थन करते हैं। हमें ऐसे दलों का बहिष्कार करना चाहिए और अपने बच्चों को इनकी साजिशों से बचाना चाहिए।
